Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

At CES, Nvidia’s CEO dropped a bombshell: “This is the ChatGPT moment for robotics.” | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | A Humanoid Robot You Have to See to Believe | At CES, Nvidia’s CEO dropped a bombshell: “This is the ChatGPT moment for robotics.” What followed stunned even seasoned analysts.A humanoid robot—powered by advanced AI—demonstrated real-world tasks with shocking precision. name: Defund ICE via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Stop ICE’s Terror Campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

This is URGENT: a shocking four people died in ICE custody in just four
days in December.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34916?source=email-20250104&t=1011&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]Headline: Four ICE detainee deaths in four days sparks alarm as arrests
grow

And it’s about to get even worse. Donald Trump is laying the groundwork
for even more aggressive roundups and workplace raids in 2026. He wants to
supercharge ICE, promising a massive new wave of deportations.

We CANNOT allow this to go on. Congress is funneling billions of our
taxpayer dollars toward ICE’s terror campaigns – and it’s going to take
massive outcry from all of us to stop it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34916?source=email-20250104&t=1012&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]Will you urgently add your name to demand Congress stop funding ICE to
terrorize our communities and unleash death, neglect, and abuse on our
neighbors, family, and friends?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34916?source=email-20250104&t=1013&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]ADD YOUR NAME

A record-breaking 30 people died in ICE custody in 2025. That’s 30 lives
cut short by inhumane policies and industrial-scale neglect – all while
ICE terrorizes our communities across the country.

Rep. Rashida Tlaib’s recent oversight visit uncovered even more horrors –
multiple suicide attempts, desperate pleas for health care, and a
dangerous shortage of medical staff. It’s clear: ICE is outright
endangering countless lives. No human being deserves to suffer behind
bars, trapped in cages or torn from their family.

And now Trump is doubling down:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34916?source=email-20250104&t=1014&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]Headline: Trump set to expand immigration enforcement in 2026 despite
backlash

Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is mobilizing rapid response protests
across the country, calling out every corporation funding ICE’s abuses.
But that alone won’t stop this machinery of terror. We need Congress to
feel the scale of our outrage from every state and every city. Which is
why we’re gearing up to scale UP this work this year to take on Trump’s
deportation nightmare head on.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34916?source=email-20250104&t=1015&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]Will you join thousands of Our Revolution supporters in flooding
Congress’s inboxes, demanding it stop sending billions to enable ICE’s
deadly detention regime?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34916?source=email-20250104&t=1016&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20250104.oCHai4&t=1007&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20250104.E4-ACa&t=1008&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20250104.zNgJ2O&t=1009&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20250104.6wF1kC&t=1010&akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=10031%2E5885482%2EHUjBHm

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are

name: Trump Approval Stats
subject: This can’t be right…

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

Peter,

I have to admit, this looks _suspicious.

_ **Right when Republicans were about to launch their ground operations for the 2026 elections, your GOP Profile was flagged as** **MISSING/INACTIVE.

** _Did you switch to the Democrat Party?

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Before Charlie was taken… he wrote this...
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e5560032/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvM1NGRmpCYkdmTg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMDQ/LbmNsN3laUzZuQQ/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MUJ0V0Q1aTV5dlBscw/gaVp5GA/s9r18418dfd)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Patriot,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e5560032/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMDQ/LbmNsN3laUzZuQQ/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MUJ0V0Q1aTV5dlBscw/gaVp5GA/s5nc8a3a110)

It's not the first time, and I've even had the _police_ called on me for trespassing. **All for simply trying to conduct oversight — as is my right as a Member of Congress.** Look, I'm an immigrant. My children are first-generation Americans. Every day, I read stories and watch videos of innocent people being violently detained and uprooted from their lives to serve Trump’s _sick_ political agenda. **As a human being,** I’m completely repulsed by what's going on in our country. **As a father,** I’m deeply worried for all the immigrant kids who are scared right now. **As a Congressman,** I’m livid that Kristi Noem and Donald Trump are carrying out these attacks on innocent people – and trying to hide it from ANY oversight. **It’s my JOB to do this. As a member of the House Committee on Oversight, it’s my responsibility and legal right to hold these people to account.** But the MAGA loyalists in the White House and Senate have made clear they have zero respect for the law – or the basic rights of our neighbors. This fight is personal to me. Trump’s policies are breaking apart families and putting lives in danger. So yes – _I’m angry._ **But look, Peter – if I've learned anything in my life as an immigrant in this country, it’s that success comes from translating our anger and worry into _action_.** That’s why I’m running for Senate. Because we need leaders with a backbone to FIGHT BACK against these attacks and stop Donald Trump before it’s too late. clean_body: These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer, you can . = Peter – I was DENIED access to an ICE facility in Chicago when I tried to check on a constituent who had been detained. It's not the first time, and I've even had the police called on me for trespassing. All for simply trying to conduct oversight — as is my right as a Member of Congress. Look, I'm an immigrant. My children are first-generation Americans. Every day, I read stories and watch videos of innocent people being violently detained and uprooted from their lives to serve Trump’s sick political agenda. As a human being, I’m completely repulsed by what's going on in our country. As a father, I’m deeply worried for all the immigrant kids who are scared right now. As a Congressman, I’m livid that Kristi Noem and Donald Trump are carrying out these attacks on innocent people – and trying to hide it from ANY oversight. It’s my JOB to do this. As a member of the House Committee on Oversight, it’s my responsibility and legal right to hold these people to account. But the MAGA loyalists in the White House and Senate have made clear they have zero respect for the law – or the basic rights of our neighbors. This fight is personal to me. Trump’s policies are breaking apart families and putting lives in danger. So yes – I’m angry. But look, Peter – if I've learned anything in my life as an immigrant in this country, it’s that success comes from translating our anger and worry into action. That’s why I’m running for Senate. Because we need leaders with a backbone to FIGHT BACK against these attacks and stop Donald Trump before it’s too late. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Raja Krishnamoorthi | Democrat Raja Krishnamoorthi is running for Senate in Illinois to fight back against Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA movement, protect critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and rebuild the middle class. name: Sick Update via Fight For Reform
subject: LOOK: The Kennedy Center named after the TRUMPS??!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23782%2E4449941%2ECyyQom) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23782%2E4449941%2ECyyQom) **Breaking from _BBC:_[ KENNEDY CENTER TO BE RENAMED TRUMP-KENNEDY CENTER, WHITE HOUSE SAYS >>>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71424?t=3&akid=23782%2E4449941%2ECyyQom)**
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71424?t=4&akid=23782%2E4449941%2ECyyQom) [**DO YOU THINK THE KENNEDY CENTER SHOULD BE RENAMED THE TRUMP-KENNEDY CENTER?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71424?t=5&akid=23782%2E4449941%2ECyyQom) | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71424?t=6&akid=23782%2E4449941%2ECyyQom)
---

[NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71424?t=7&akid=23782%2E4449941%2ECyyQom)
---
_** 10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED FROM YOUR STATE BEFORE MIDNIGHT **_
Look, MAGA Republicans are doing everything to glorify Trump and his family as if they're kings and dictators:

⭕ Adding his face to Mt. Rushmore...
⭕ Making his birthday a national holiday...
⭕ Renaming the Washington, D.C. subway the “Trump Train”...

**_But they’ve stooped to a new low._**

[The Kennedy Center Opera House is a historic institution honoring President Kennedy. Slapping Trump's name on it is nothing but an embarrassing attempt to curry favor with Donald Trump.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71424?t=8&akid=23782%2E4449941%2ECyyQom)

This is dangerous. If we don’t push back, they’ll keep rewriting history the way Donald Trump wants it to be told.

If we’re going to stop this, we need to prove that Americans from Arkansas to Arizona agree. So please, friend, let us know what you think below:
[**DO YOU THINK THE KENNEDY CENTER SHOULD BE RENAMED THE TRUMP-KENNEDY CENTER?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71424?t=9&akid=23782%2E4449941%2ECyyQom)
[YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71424?t=10&akid=23782%2E4449941%2ECyyQom)
---

[NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71424?t=11&akid=23782%2E4449941%2ECyyQom)
---
Thanks for your input,

Fight for Reform

clean_body: Peter, You're probably getting lots of fundraising emails. Believe it or not, I get them too! In fact, Senate Republicans recently OUTRAISED Senate Democrats, so I'm not going to give you a sky-is-falling fundraising pitch. As Senate Majority Leader, I'm focused on the ONE and ONLY thing that wins elections: So, my priority right now is fixing the fact that our party 's voter file is LAGGING behind the Democrats'. And your voter profile was brought to my attention for being flagged asINCOMPLETE. Look, we can be winning in the polls (we are), we can be winning by passing President Trump 's agenda in the Senate and HOLDING THE LINE against Schumer (we are), and we can be winning in popularity over the Democrats (we absolutely are)... Thank you, Senator John Thune | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

subject: I just need a minute of your time

body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4797bb6eb73242b6bacb95659845a5a2&_e=l4PTGiCcGhOIX64lU_tMCf2dne16HOvE8RDcFio2RdhH00JuMpubAB9Gdy93_c4DATqYLbEFUGH8EnzRXjQRhiWJkRr-tTti1Vmf8mHwPj1V9nKNk8EAsjp7CiMEaKjZUZrnYpPkVRJHUhILT4OEqGPcwUM5nOU7W4u6_asBydPfCwSz4fmuzGAztxcfy1NQI7GlMU5yQTPuMGuJOGmywZGg2LNb84qCqwP1sr_pLjO7vchkFux_b_rBQVeIKW1ZMuF58L_eNo22nzQ9Mi-G4eZE-XYx75llpUeuCgYVTspnocS-BgIs1LBE9NcU24LjB1DJie_3GB9F8XHRBrrTsXO8VvZIMoS5mhiVIxpbKGv4hKWjcD7FsaUzbywvbj1jipWoRC63vV_wLJpEvrXjzkGEWxbbrZDxM4vrSrM_Z9hwLN4dHeraSbjnh2CGNdNgW4yhdrKCvKsN2NBattQTTWQ9D669t8D7YLV0hPV8aOqGzo7ov_H7i0xKdGQelnXZ0aiv-iXXzdTtYefkSqCZz-gPId3Iiis23KFMX_J8YtHjxzvuE1hDFLhv4hhBfDbysJWkYjxh1up5PAVCIu0TZuCdlggeL09S0g1WRaBrgFxqomLtOoN5TAZNmEWiyXamqMSHFLI_p5C1U1-nky4a3cdNbL70TxdhiUyu6XfeWEQ%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4797bb6eb73242b6bacb95659845a5a2&_e=l4PTGiCcGhOIX64lU_tMCf2dne16HOvE8RDcFio2RdhH00JuMpubAB9Gdy93_c4DATqYLbEFUGH8EnzRXjQRhiWJkRr-tTti1Vmf8mHwPj1V9nKNk8EAsjp7CiMEaKjZUZrnYpPkVRJHUhILT4OEqGPcwUM5nOU7W4u6_asBydPfCwSz4fmuzGAztxcfy1NQI7GlMU5yQTPuMGuJOGmywZGg2LNb84qCqwP1sr_pLjN6ZzROT8ukL49S0XoI9s0udaXFdRdIsstKOI7hFVh9wZEWnGecrKQROneNe9ylYTgTyZH8MEHrXBWU1QMBus9qWl7HafNdNrKUYcOdBYh3_58ktO3q3YoEzoXxV3Tk5-7I9SB5hjwaKjDS1mw23MXJHTdl6RRubOov9fX1NQHMF6dwI2qDWAf_6ySLU4jcDswZPUGKqJ7Wu3W1cqewecP00MoJGGtbDqZCrt2NVcnJrQfhtjuuWRZ6L-NMdIZh_OD5z-5nPSJo7xPxJX7u8DfgvI6d6gb6NID-7XI6wclHRjHiYeNuQXux6La5WUrZuAUy6MDciNhjq1ZbkfyVFOFaBqa-o-WerPEdh8Qdu_LlnI2iNj1RMvkiqzNqfNnalrEoW-wfTMY94cY5lEJajVOdRRtn0t-ZLkcsDspUXnuOnkB9Woneh39ta1554SMhYxg%3D)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Peter, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4797bb6eb73242b6bacb95659845a5a2&_e=l4PTGiCcGhOIX64lU_tMCf2dne16HOvE8RDcFio2RdhH00JuMpubAB9Gdy93_c4DATqYLbEFUGH8EnzRXjQRhiWJkRr-tTti1Vmf8mHwPj1V9nKNk8EAsjp7CiMEaKjZUZrnYpPkVRJHUhILT4OEqGPcwUM5nOU7W4u6_asBydPfCwSz4fmuzGAztxcfy1NQI7GlMU5yQTPuMGuJOGmywZGg2LNb84qCqwP1sr_pLjOyYpHbq6sHqyFxPI3A2VeqTRWj80zmFKG5nknkq73QDhNzpHeGOXUbO7SO2Z3EJMuKZtWrLlNo_5CX-5ojptXL15cHw8cXRRG-qbDFxk86cVv7p6ERlU94T02TJ_yyO2GHgsT5m5EaG5clERJgHnAU4szgpeM73v6JH_sh77RlSrHHSNHGT_3vkKg2Qg-4klcQc3a14tSAgZOyT5svmSJ3EcidJCMBJpAqf_1cVd84f4SnrH6gbq7YF7VmvOWl3MHZQrr6dTJ1n2K5_mhLkwxveLHGKb34TzGvC1byU3zeCDkhQ3jAQUjRH7DNtGUw5McQGno78D08PttEda2KDE6fUu7busTExXVkZgivcWOC_G-MySl7kHVxjVktrEcf1Ihg3QE4hZ_1g8A5lmGcUTpQTWa4oFTsKYLRITmz5xUqHKlnu5Q85SD7f4mFOuPHqhE%3D)

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: | Peter, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Peter, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

MAGA Republicans can come after me, lie about me on social media, and do whatever else they want - but when they hurt the people of Minnesota to score political points, that crosses a line.

name: Free People of America
subject: Join Royce White & Professor Penn – Community Event Jan 7 in Wayzata
disclaimer_text: Paid for by supporters of Royce White
body:
Together for Change
| | |
---
|
# Together for Change
---
| |
---
|
> Dear Friend,
> You're invited to join U.S. Senate candidate Royce White for a special community event!
> Wednesday, January 7, 2026
> 7:00-9:00 PM
> Wayzata Central Middle School
> 305 Vicksburg Ln N, Plymouth, MN 55447
> Doors open at 6:15pm
>
>
> This event will be moderated by David Penn, host of the Professor Penn Podcast, bringing a thoughtful discussion, open dialogue, and a clear-eyed look at the challenges facing Minnesota and our country. Royce believes real change starts with honest conversations and engaged citizens--not consultants or political insiders.
> This is your opportunity to:
* Hear directly from Royce White about his vision for Minnesota
* Engage in meaningful discussion with the candidate and your community
* Connect with fellow supporters who believe it's time to put people first
* Help build the grassroots momentum needed to win

> Campaigns like this are powered by everyday Americans who are willing to stand up and be counted. If you're able, please consider making a contribution to support Royce White's campaign. Your donation helps fund community events like this one, expand outreach, and ensure this movement stays strong and independent.
> Donate if you can--every contribution, no matter the size, makes a real difference at [roycewhite.us](https://5vev59hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P6n-wJ1WvatVxWcmy4hupXqYI-wat6NRO8S_4rQ9YaZa_-kpjHXQpwz5z1xo5A12KV_rHxmfvye9EfnIv4aIODnzIu76lXwwcflupONgZhDPHoY4yfsK0yKz7XdRE_VDs8m8skfKks_V7IYk6cD3_g==&c=mYuHrdv7MaPTVJRLb0hckjyMBlcNrWe5KAGyuEe7WezOCxDT_dpxAA==&ch=D2Hdoae-qlX2devSYJRL8xYSR-PYCa9f4sBxfYbbGf1a1vvygJ2V_A==)
> Together, we can restore authenticity, courage, and American common sense to Washington D.C.
> See you on January 7th!
> In solidarity,
> Ann Bateman
> Campaign Organizer and American Citizen - Royce White for U.S. Senate '26
> Paid for by supporters of Royce White. Contributions are not tax deductible.

---
---
| | | | Free People of America | PO Box 5473 | Hopkins, MN 55343 US

name: Team Taylor
subject: Add your name to stand with Judge Chris Taylor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Every endorsement helps us show voters what this campaign is really about — people coming together to protect our shared values and the integrity of our courts.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260104-982&t=1&akid=987%2E294397%2EW2qdUi)
As we speed toward April, there’s one thing that matters more than anything else: **Highlighting Judge Chris Taylor’s broad support from people who believe in fair, impartial courts.**
That’s where you come in!
Adding your name as an endorser is a powerful way to demonstrate momentum early in the election year and show everyone that Judge Chris Taylor is backed by everyday people like you, not special interests.
Every endorsement helps us show voters what this campaign is really about — people coming together to protect our shared values and the integrity of our courts.
[**Will you add your name today to personally endorse Judge Chris Taylor? It’ll only take a minute, but it’ll have a big impact on showcasing our growing grassroots coalition.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/endorsement_petition_dec/?source=em20260104-982&akid=987%2E294397%2EW2qdUi)
**[Endorse Chris ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/endorsement_petition_dec/?source=em20260104-982&akid=987%2E294397%2EW2qdUi)**
Thank you for being part of this fight and for standing with us as we head into this critical election year.
— Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20260104-982&t=3&refcode2=987_294397_W2qdUi&akid=987%2E294397%2EW2qdUi)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=987%2E294397%2EW2qdUi)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=987%2E294397%2EW2qdUi)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)
Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

For a limited time, you can get it for **70% OFF + Free Shipping**. Here’s why the Black Widow has earned its reputation: **[Lightning-Fast Deployment](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22295/6374453/dd462e29ba372215f674d3271f4828b2a1f83367/e453b1470e383eadf77e7a2a3b938edbe984f4bb)** – Patent-pending spring action fires open with a single click. **3.75” Triple-Beveled Razor Edge** – Military-grade 420 stainless steel that stays sharp for years. **Dual-Edge Power** – Straight and serrated edges cut through rope, branches, and more. **Emergency Glass Breaker** – Break out or rescue in seconds. **Grip You Can Trust** – Non-slip aluminum handle works in rain, sweat, or gloves. **Compact EDC Size** – Fits in your pocket, purse, nightstand, or glovebox. But this sale won’t last. Quantities are extremely limited, and once this batch sells out, the price goes back up. **[Claim Your Black Widow OTF Switchblade – 70% OFF Today »](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22295/6374453/dd462e29ba372215f674d3271f4828b2a1f83367/e453b1470e383eadf77e7a2a3b938edbe984f4bb)** Stay ready,

To view this email as a webpage, click =. | | | When every second counts, you need a blade you can trust. The was built for people who demand speed, power, and reliability in their everyday carry. For a limited time, you can get it for 70% OFF + Free Shipping. Here’s why the Black Widow has earned its reputation: – Patent-pending spring action fires open with a single click. 3.75” Triple-Beveled Razor Edge – Military-grade 420 stainless steel that stays sharp for years. Dual-Edge Power – Straight and serrated edges cut through rope, branches, and more. Emergency Glass Breaker – Break out or rescue in seconds. Grip You Can Trust – Non-slip aluminum handle works in rain, sweat, or gloves. Compact EDC Size – Fits in your pocket, purse, nightstand, or glovebox. But this sale won’t last. Quantities are extremely limited, and once this batch sells out, the price goes back up. Stay ready, National Gun Owner P.S. name: Powered by People
subject: Texas just opened a door
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240577%2E444211%2EWUz1Lh)
Texas just opened the door to **205 real opportunities** to change this state for the better—and Powered by People helped make it all possible.
In 2025, we were on the ground across Texas—recruiting candidates, having conversations in places that are too often ignored, and building the kind of grassroots infrastructure that lasts well beyond a single election.
**The goal wasn’t flashy. It was foundational: make sure Texans have a real choice on every ballot, in every race, everywhere in the state.**
And together, we made it happen. For the first time in modern state history, Democrats are running for every State House, State Senate, and Congressional seat on the ballot. _That’s 39 seats in Congress, 16 seats in the State Senate, and 150 seats in the State House._
Those numbers matter because they represent opportunity—205 chances to organize new voters, 205 chances to deepen relationships in communities that have been ignored for decades, and 205 chances to hold extremists accountable while forcing them to defend every inch of ground instead of running uncontested.
This is how change starts in Texas. Not overnight, but on the ground every day, everywhere. Not by writing people off, but by showing up and doing the work.
**Now comes the next phase:_turning opportunity into power._ Supporting these candidates, registering voters, deploying volunteers, and mobilizing Texans across the state. That’s the work Powered by People was built to do. And it only happens because this movement is powered by people like you.**
[**If you’re able, chip in today to help us seize this moment, register voters, and keep building long-term power in Texas. We’re competing everywhere. Now let’s organize everywhere.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260104.U0GaiY&refcode=ema20260104-240577&t=3&akid=240577%2E444211%2EWUz1Lh)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260104.U0GaiY&refcode=ema20260104-240577&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240577%2E444211%2EWUz1Lh)**
Thank you,
Powered by People

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20260104-240577-footer&t=23&refcode2=240577_444211_WUz1Lh&akid=240577%2E444211%2EWUz1Lh)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/ai-analyzes-my-predictions?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a44c6878-7dbe-4062-9d66-f338236bef2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In preparation for the publication of my annual predictions on January 7th, I asked Notion AI (a blend of ChatGPT and Claude) to tell me how well I've done over the past 11 years. Here's its response -- unedited, and complete with links to its sources.
* * *
Here's a concise, "synthesized" view of your annual predictions over roughly the last decade, with an emphasis on what actually played out.
### 1\. What the annual predictions are
Across LinkedIn, your site, and now Substack, you've been publishing "X Global Developments To Watch Over the Next Five Years" each year since at least 2015.[[1]](https://substack.com/redirect/3298fc27-c95a-4c79-ab51-5a51e8f24a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[2]](https://substack.com/redirect/07fcf4d2-6591-42fe-8af3-f623371489cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[3]](https://substack.com/redirect/c2783418-710f-4a18-b557-a64cf75150ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[4]](https://substack.com/redirect/17883c87-6d05-4c6f-823a-482308cfdd68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[5]](https://substack.com/redirect/8cf6c260-067a-43b2-b4da-e7812adc36db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[6]](https://substack.com/redirect/cba09c86-0824-4c0a-957e-6e69691913ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Each list is framed as a five‐year look‐ahead, not a one‐year forecast, which matters when judging "hits."
Broadly, the lists consistently emphasized:
* Geopolitical realignment (US-China, Russia, Europe's cohesion, NATO, populism)
* Debt, monetary policy, and asset bubbles
* Technological shifts (AI, cyber, telecoms bifurcation)
* Supply chains and de‐globalization
* Pandemics and global health risk
* Climate and resource constraints (energy, water, food)

### 2\. Major themes that clearly _did_ materialize
Below I group the clearest "hits" by theme rather than by year; in most cases you flagged these dynamics _before_ they were mainstream.
### A. US-China tension and bifurcation of the global system
In the 2019-2023 prediction cycles you repeatedly highlighted a de facto "Cold War II" dynamic and the emergence of two economic/technology blocs led by the US and China.[[1]](https://substack.com/redirect/3298fc27-c95a-4c79-ab51-5a51e8f24a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[6]](https://substack.com/redirect/cba09c86-0824-4c0a-957e-6e69691913ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[3]](https://substack.com/redirect/c2783418-710f-4a18-b557-a64cf75150ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**What transpired:**
* Systematic US export controls on advanced chips and manufacturing equipment.
* Growing restrictions and scrutiny on Chinese apps and investments in the US and allied countries.
* "Friend‐shoring" and "de‐risking" supply chains away from China by US, EU, Japan, etc.
* Explicit language from policymakers and strategists that now openly frames US-China as the central strategic rivalry.

This is one of the strongest, clearly vindicated themes.
### B. Resurgence of great‐power / Cold War‐style rivalry
Earlier lists also projected a renewed great‐power competition involving Russia, China, and the US, with nuclear and military buildups noted as likely.[[1]](https://substack.com/redirect/3298fc27-c95a-4c79-ab51-5a51e8f24a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**What transpired:**
* Russia's full‐scale invasion of Ukraine in 2022, NATO expansion, and re‐militarization in Europe.
* Accelerated modernization and expansion of nuclear arsenals by US, Russia, and China.
* Broader talk in policy circles of "Cold War II" - almost exactly your phrasing in earlier pieces.[[1]](https://substack.com/redirect/3298fc27-c95a-4c79-ab51-5a51e8f24a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

### C. Populism, nationalism, and political volatility
Your 2016-2024 pieces consistently emphasized populist/nationalist waves and anti‐establishment politics as a structural force.[[1]](https://substack.com/redirect/3298fc27-c95a-4c79-ab51-5a51e8f24a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[2]](https://substack.com/redirect/07fcf4d2-6591-42fe-8af3-f623371489cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[4]](https://substack.com/redirect/17883c87-6d05-4c6f-823a-482308cfdd68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[5]](https://substack.com/redirect/8cf6c260-067a-43b2-b4da-e7812adc36db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[7]](https://substack.com/redirect/40d5c238-0b20-4406-a5cf-5769be314d02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**What transpired:**
* Brexit, Trump's rise (and later Trump 2.0/MAGA persistence), Bolsonaro, Modi, Meloni, Le Pen's National Rally strengthening, and parallel trends across Latin America and Europe.
* Persistent "anti‐incumbent" sentiment highlighted in your 2025 "25 Global Developments..." review of the ultimate election year, with many ruling parties punished at the polls.[[7]](https://substack.com/redirect/40d5c238-0b20-4406-a5cf-5769be314d02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

While you were hardly alone in seeing populism, you were early in treating it as a _continuing global development_ rather than a one‐off shock.
### D. Pandemics and global health shocks
In the 2015 list you speculated that Ebola would be contained but that another, potentially airborne epidemic could emerge.[[1]](https://substack.com/redirect/3298fc27-c95a-4c79-ab51-5a51e8f24a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**What transpired:**
* COVID‐19, an airborne respiratory disease, arrived within that five‐year forecast window (2015-2020).
* COVID then catalyzed exactly the kind of global economic, political, and social disruption you had been flagging in the broader lists.

This looks, with hindsight, like one of the more striking "on‐theme" calls, even if it was framed as a possibility rather than a precise prediction.
### E. Cyber conflict and state cyber‐armies
As far back as the mid‐2010s you flagged the rise of state‐backed "military‐like cyber teams" and warned that such forces might not be able to prevent a destabilizing attack on critical infrastructure.[[1]](https://substack.com/redirect/3298fc27-c95a-4c79-ab51-5a51e8f24a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**What transpired:**
* Rapid growth in US, Chinese, Russian, Iranian, and North Korean offensive and defensive cyber units.
* Major cyber incidents affecting pipelines, hospitals, energy grids, government agencies, and corporations around the world.
* Cyber operations now routinely described by governments as a primary domain of conflict.

The broad contours of that scenario clearly materialized, even if no single "Lights Out"‐style event fully matched Ted Koppel's nightmare.
### F. Inflation, then the risk of deflation and financial instability
You discussed debt, easy money, and the risk of monetary missteps for many years. Later, in 2023, you wrote explicitly about the risk that _deflation_ could become a bigger concern than inflation once the post‐COVID surge faded.[[8]](https://substack.com/redirect/d799d183-ff25-4fab-9461-bd3feb8f06fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**What transpired:**
* A vicious post‐COVID inflation spike, followed by aggressive global tightening.
* Bank stresses and failures (e.g., regional banks in the US) tied in part to rate‐shock in bond portfolios.
* Now, widespread concern about disinflation/deflation risks in some major economies, with markets oscillating between inflation and deflation fears, very much in line with your "don't fixate only on inflation" warning.

More broadly, you were consistently right that monetary policy and debt dynamics would be central to the decade's macro story.
### G. De‐globalization and supply‐chain rewiring
From early on you flagged that globalization could go into reverse, with supply chains re‐routed and trade blocs re‐forming.[[4]](https://substack.com/redirect/17883c87-6d05-4c6f-823a-482308cfdd68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[3]](https://substack.com/redirect/c2783418-710f-4a18-b557-a64cf75150ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[1]](https://substack.com/redirect/3298fc27-c95a-4c79-ab51-5a51e8f24a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**What transpired:**
* Tariffs and trade wars between US and China.
* COVID‐era supply shocks leading to "resilience" and "security" becoming central in supply‐chain strategy.
* Active re‐shoring, near‐shoring, and friend‐shoring by multinationals and governments.

Your framing of "retreat of globalization" and emergence of regional blocs has held up well.
### H. Technology platforms, AI, and telecoms bifurcation
You highlighted telecom platforms and tech infrastructure as likely drivers of a split global economy, and more recently devoted major space to AI and its geopolitical/economic implications.[[1]](https://substack.com/redirect/3298fc27-c95a-4c79-ab51-5a51e8f24a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[9]](https://substack.com/redirect/040e6c44-c8ac-4ede-9beb-41472a500357?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**What transpired:**
* 5G and network equipment suppliers became strategic issues (Huawei, Ericsson, Nokia, etc.) with explicit security concerns baked into policy.
* Export controls on AI chips and foundational models, and debates over who controls cloud and compute.
* AI became a front‐page global issue, with exactly the kind of "uncertainty plus opportunity" framing you applied in your 2023-2025 writing.[[9]](https://substack.com/redirect/040e6c44-c8ac-4ede-9beb-41472a500357?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

### I. Climate, energy, and resource politics
Over multiple years you flagged:
* Energy and commodity volatility
* Tension between climate policy and energy security
* The political and economic implications of those swings[[1]](https://substack.com/redirect/3298fc27-c95a-4c79-ab51-5a51e8f24a94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[[6]...](https://substack.com/redirect/cba09c86-0824-4c0a-957e-6e69691913ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Night Vision Optic
subject: Night Vision: Now Available to the Public (shipping covered...)
body:
| | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans.

name: Haley Stevens
subject: I'll make this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1817%2E49239%2EP5Gv7p)
| | | |
---
Hi null, I know you're busy, so I promise to make this quick:

**I just got word from my finance team that we're 82% of the way to our Founding Donor goal, which means we've still got a ways to go before tomorrow's deadline.**
With MAGA megadonors spending big to flip Michigan red in 2026, we need to kick this election year off as strong as possible if we're going to power this campaign to victory in November. **That's why I have to ask you:**
**[Will you chip in $5 or more right now to become a Founding Donor of my campaign to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11245?t=2&akid=1817%2E49239%2EP5Gv7p)**
With grit and gratitude,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11246?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1817%2E49239%2EP5Gv7p) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11247?t=4&akid=1817%2E49239%2EP5Gv7p)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=5&akid=1817%2E49239%2EP5Gv7p)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This wasn’t in my plan
body:
Are you with me?
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=247%2E124072%2EDHv6Ad)
Peter, I didn’t plan on running for federal office. I wanted to serve North Carolina from right here at home. But when I look at what’s happening in this country today, I know I can’t leave things as they are for my daughters, or for their children, or for yours. **[With the help and support of countless folks across our nation, I’m working hard to win the most competitive U.S. Senate race of 2026 so I can take to Washington the fight for our fundamental rights and freedoms. Could you help us out by contributing any amount today?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3704?t=7&akid=247%2E124072%2EDHv6Ad)** Americans risked — and even lost — their lives for the rights that extreme Republicans now want to rip away. The right to vote. To live free of discrimination. To access an abortion. To get a quality public education. The schemes pushed by the far right won’t give us a country where all of us are equally free and equally worthy of dignity and respect. But the values I stand for will, and I’m ready to fight for them. **[If you’re in the fight with me, I’m asking you to donate today. Even a small amount will help — our grassroots average gift is around $35 this month, but no donation is too small. Click here to give what you can to help me defeat my MAGA opponent and fix what’s broken in Washington.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3705?t=8&akid=247%2E124072%2EDHv6Ad)** | **[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3704?t=9&akid=247%2E124072%2EDHv6Ad)**
---
Thank you,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3704?t=10&akid=247%2E124072%2EDHv6Ad)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=247%2E124072%2EDHv6Ad)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=247%2E124072%2EDHv6Ad)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=247%2E124072%2EDHv6Ad)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=247%2E124072%2EDHv6Ad)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=247%2E124072%2EDHv6Ad)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=247%2E124072%2EDHv6Ad)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=11&akid=247%2E124072%2EDHv6Ad)

The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Polly — my role model
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122640889/593096460/164382108?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.04_Polly_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzYzNjAzYi04YWU5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MBIM12LsajpGM0EwExs3NaIuSQMBIFgx_FozJnUd6UQ=) Can I get a bit more personal than usual? This is a photo of me and my late grandmother, Polly. I’ve been feeling nostalgic and reflecting on why I got involved in politics — and my story starts with her. My grandmother was my first role model and my fiercest supporter. At a time when few women were involved in politics, Polly was a force – a fixture in Albany and the first person to raise their hand and volunteer. Growing up, I stuffed envelopes with Grandma Polly on weekends and slapped bumper stickers on cars — learning that civic participation is a responsibility that all of us should take seriously. She was a fiery example of what it looks like to advocate loudly for anyone without a voice. She NEVER backed down from an argument she knew she could win. **I’m thinking a lot about the example Grandma Polly set for me, especially now that we’re preparing for our biggest fight yet: flipping the Senate in 2026.** We can’t be complacent in this work. The stakes are too high and I refuse to let MAGA Republicans corrupt our government and erase our progress any longer. But if we’re serious about getting this done, we need this movement to step up and make sure we have the resources we need to invest big in our Senate work. Republicans already have shady super PACs and billionaires pouring dark money into battleground Senate races across the country. **I’m carrying on Grandma Polly’s legacy by advocating loudly and unapologetically in the Senate for everyone who needs a voice — and I’m ready to elect even more fierce Democrats to the Senate in the midterms.[_Will you join me and give $10 or more?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122640890/593096461/164382108?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.04_Polly_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzYzNjAzYi04YWU5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MBIM12LsajpGM0EwExs3NaIuSQMBIFgx_FozJnUd6UQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122640891/593096462/164382108?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.04_Polly_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzYzNjAzYi04YWU5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MBIM12LsajpGM0EwExs3NaIuSQMBIFgx_FozJnUd6UQ=) **
