| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: Neil Armstrong reported a strange encounter he had in space during a post-mission debrief.| | | | January 04 | | | | | What Neil Armstrong REALLY saw on the moon [TERRIFYING] | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Get the full truth now while it’s still publicly available. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. | | Peter, This is Mike.

I just got out of a meeting that left me absolutely shaken. Leadership shared something with me – something devastating – and I can’t talk about it openly.

But I had to tell someone... and after thinking long and hard about who I could trust, I chose you.

[**I wrote a private note that explains what’s happening. It’s raw, humble, and deeply personal. Not my staff. Not my advisors. If this note spreads beyond you, Democrats will weaponize it and Trump’s Senate majority dreams will collapse. That’s why I’m pleading with you: Thank you for being there in a moment when I needed someone. — Mike Rogers Candidate for U.S. Senate – Michigan | | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate |

name: Brown, Sherrod
subject: If we stand together, we will win.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I need you with me, Peter.
Peter,
I never planned on running for office again.
But I see what’s happening in Washington – and I can’t stay on the sidelines.
**I’m jumping in this fight: I’m running for Senate.**
_Why?_ Because Ohioans are working harder than ever, and they’re still falling behind.
_Why?_ Because wages are flat.
_Why?_ Because costs are rising.
_Why?_ Because the people in power are only looking out for their rich friends and corporate interests.
No one is fighting for Ohio workers and families in the Senate. But with your support, we can change that.
We can build a country where workers share in the wealth they create, where hard work pays off, and where everyone who works hard can afford a decent life.
This won’t be easy – and with Ohio being one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, we know there are many fights ahead. But if we stand together, we will win.
**[I need you with me, Peter: Will you chip in $10 split with Heartland Patriots right now to help me flip Ohio’s Senate seat and stand up for workers across the country?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99063?refcode=em20260104-9900&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1&akid=9900%2E614464%2E1z7cGE)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99063?refcode=em20260104-9900&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9900%2E614464%2E1z7cGE)**
In solidarity,
Sherrod

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---
Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=3&akid=9900%2E614464%2E1z7cGE). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: I have decided to present you with the Trump Patriot Medal! CONGRATULATIONS AND THANK YOU, There is no greater honor in the world to me than serving as President of the United States. Every day, I work tirelessly to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! I would not have been able to do any of this without you, and I want to share a very special honor with you! This is why I have decided to present you with the Trump Patriot Medal: This is one of the greatest honors in the Trump World. JD Vance, Marco Rubio, and Karoline Leavitt have this award. I cannot thank you enough for your unwavering support. Together, we will continue to usher in a new era of AMERICAN GREATNESS! Thank you for everything, and congratulations! Bailey Unveils Illinois DOGE, Taps Del Mar to Target Pritzker-Era Waste (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2026/01/bailey-unveils-illinois-doge-taps-del-mar-to-target-pritzker-era-waste.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=db3f886d94-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2026/01/bailey-unveils-illinois-doge-taps-del-mar-to-target-pritzker-era-waste.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=db3f886d94-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(Chris Sweda/Chicago Tribune)
By Illinois Review

Illinois Republican gubernatorial candidate Darren Bailey announced Friday that, if elected, he plans to create an Illinois Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) aimed at identifying and eliminating waste, fraud, and abuse in state government.

According to Bailey’s campaign, the proposed agency would be launched early in his administration and led by his lieutenant governor nominee, Aaron Del Mar, who would oversee the initiative and report its findings publicly.

Bailey’s announcement comes amid ongoing debate over state spending, taxes, and Illinois’ economic competitiveness. This publication has previously reported that since 2018, the administration of Gov. JB Pritzker has overseen at least $22 billion in known or documented wasteful spending.
https://x.com/darrenbaileyil/status/2007216719417233520?s=12&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=db3f886d94-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
That figure includes spending on contracts, grants, and programs critics argue delivered limited returns for taxpayers.

Illinois continues to face fiscal pressures, including high property taxes and concerns about public safety in some parts of the state. At the same time, several high-profile companies have relocated operations or headquarters outside Illinois in recent years.

Financial firm Citadel moved its headquarters to Florida. Boeing relocated its corporate headquarters from Chicago, and Caterpillar moved its headquarters out of the state. In addition, the Chicago Bears have publicly explored Indiana as a possible location for a future stadium project.

Bailey’s proposed Illinois DOGE is modeled after the federal Department of Government Efficiency, an initiative initially led by Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy.

According to information published on the department’s official website, the federal DOGE reported identifying approximately $215 billion in taxpayer savings as of January 1, 2026. The reported savings include contract cancellations, grant terminations, lease reductions, fraud detection efforts, workforce changes, and the elimination of unused software and administrative programs.

Bailey said his proposal is intended to apply a similar approach at the state level, with an emphasis on transparency and public accountability.

With taxes high, crime rampant, and jobs leaving, Bailey has framed DOGE as a first step toward restoring public trust in state government amid ongoing concerns over taxes, public safety, and job losses.

clean_body: view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert. Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. X () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Bailey Unveils Illinois DOGE, Taps Del Mar to Target Pritzker-Era Waste () (Chris Sweda/Chicago Tribune) By Illinois Review Illinois Republican gubernatorial candidate Darren Bailey announced Friday that, if elected, he plans to create an Illinois Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) aimed at identifying and eliminating waste, fraud, and abuse in state government. According to Bailey’s campaign, the proposed agency would be launched early in his administration and led by his lieutenant governor nominee, Aaron Del Mar, who would oversee the initiative and report its findings publicly. Bailey’s announcement comes amid ongoing debate over state spending, taxes, and Illinois’ economic competitiveness. This publication has previously reported that since 2018, the administration of Gov. JB Pritzker has overseen at least $22 billion in known or documented wasteful spending. That figure includes spending on contracts, grants, and programs critics argue delivered limited returns for taxpayers. Illinois continues to face fiscal pressures, including high property taxes and concerns about public safety in some parts of the state. At the same time, several high-profile companies have relocated operations or headquarters outside Illinois in recent years. Financial firm Citadel moved its headquarters to Florida. Boeing relocated its corporate headquarters from Chicago, and Caterpillar moved its headquarters out of the state. In addition, the Chicago Bears have publicly explored Indiana as a possible location for a future stadium project. Bailey’s proposed Illinois DOGE is modeled after the federal Department of Government Efficiency, an initiative initially led by Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy. According to information published on the department’s official website, the federal DOGE reported identifying approximately $215 billion in taxpayer savings as of January 1, 2026. The reported savings include contract cancellations, grant terminations, lease reductions, fraud detection efforts, workforce changes, and the elimination of unused software and administrative programs. Bailey said his proposal is intended to apply a similar approach at the state level, with an emphasis on transparency and public accountability. With taxes high, crime rampant, and jobs leaving, Bailey has framed DOGE as a first step toward restoring public trust in state government amid ongoing concerns over taxes, public safety, and job losses. name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The quietest thing Charlie ever did was the most powerful
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e13408442/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvY0NhVUt6WE1oNA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMDQ/LbmNseDFCdFlrZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmMxRG9oYWdQaHlaS0Vscw/gaVqkNA/s1nbb5c67d0)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Patriot,
---
| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth — but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn’t about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath.**

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**[And when you make a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA today, we’ll send you a copy of Charlie’s final book — as our thank you for carrying his legacy forward.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP.**_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that — as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You’ll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would’ve wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you’re not just supporting the movement Charlie built — you’re helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months.**

**[And we’ll ship you a copy of Charlie’s final book straight to your door.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage — _the very things Charlie gave his life for._

And as you do, may the message of this book lead you — just as it led Charlie — to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
**P.S.** Charlie Kirk’s final book, _**Stop, in the Name of God,**_ is a heartfelt call to slow down, remember what’s eternal, and rest in God.

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Sabbath rest anchored Charlie’s life
body:

---
| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. **

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." **_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=765147e047cf4d409e607b6ea921d9ce&_e=78_h8Zx3-Z1BACkDYUkxMSbT87Xny0kSxWRtEB2wOQujCKABXhXiAHfu6LeRAZ3T8g-SPcYoJUIRgrRWKZiFHMqN_dpwMYdITRcI_KusE77-HxMK6v9jJUTQy3-8CuSyRxoby8OVIiDvYoYGiBhnFo1RHFU05r-5LHvtp8m2FgZxlt80Zfof4P6fJQO3Eu950RD_Nf4Uh34cWLupG6Xp5yHZdIjzg87jPSFk1Rh0xNF4deb9genxQTQA37UgbRyKP0d2Mnj7TorSTp3z23ZeEanCREAzMJ9WUxdFJU2TUDROFINGF0MYJQw6j8Nvq79we8sKpCYzcbO59PiCe9v6MODz2y2fsZvTy8AkJTO7iyx3M6L-42dI2Y8XoIMOVXS0jFlhz7BRwl8FJo4t7R8-WczbbSXSNbnigw_A5x6BNR9OBAmEOBUupSLn0XWon478LpCsnGo7ONW7SlmSREi5M82U35cubUStW83PZkuXKRFA7Iqc-5PKz9_D8X3qpQZDGyKe2fR_3iFi9vDNjNdpw4lKNf3MpGvawTcoZk-JwmlKdBLRX4CUC_2zmsTH1FEJ-pOsImtsGS9-AdmiMxoCSNgSrgPLmLBqmHeZX-dn7E6toOKqk1rB31x9TGnh5mVYF4VCjGmGZBesn4vZWHCmAy5dpKzk-wYenO-mCYQsWJoDJN4AlKN1DMtlEKuKlURo)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=765147e047cf4d409e607b6ea921d9ce&_e=78_h8Zx3-Z1BACkDYUkxMSbT87Xny0kSxWRtEB2wOQujCKABXhXiAHfu6LeRAZ3T8g-SPcYoJUIRgrRWKZiFHMqN_dpwMYdITRcI_KusE77-HxMK6v9jJUTQy3-8CuSyRxoby8OVIiDvYoYGiBhnFo1RHFU05r-5LHvtp8m2FgZxlt80Zfof4P6fJQO3Eu950RD_Nf4Uh34cWLupG6Xp5yHZdIjzg87jPSFk1Rh0xNFiQNmzB_F6CHjzaxNoe3tvBcnibAvJYszdqVsxq-uhDkfLvHXLvcpBOTyjA5Hk0MG3HmmC_8avU-4H7k5D0qXC3sqyC4pbgIFi1uxfl8JE_9DsEgIpmU1-jL-Z1IHBUmqWrFRMl6GrSvuesSlBpuwSvAMOD8QfgPZALhLlZ6ed4EyXLnntczTelcOjdec_KB-mW3H-tGIWB9ViL38em-Tk9H-Ld9zo60iWzq95GzAaIqMqmossBK3wMTALElQ13T-i5zf91ZHUqeYxRSY_iWfnO4y5n7H1_HY7MQ5Y51OwgKDkVJqi4VlfvPQ0TKonzmX1QQ67fbqrxeWmsT0_DjW6ehR7SH-vb_v2dgZ0qmnJXI8_2WMaI3KxjepabllmeoXNb1eszOyKwUoBCWUdFGdFqZCH-Vy595z3PYlE5Sr8n8HAVI-g0yqoORb3IzpwiYRbK5dI1Njp-AcJ_Zq0HJnR)**

**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=765147e047cf4d409e607b6ea921d9ce&_e=78_h8Zx3-Z1BACkDYUkxMSbT87Xny0kSxWRtEB2wOQujCKABXhXiAHfu6LeRAZ3T8g-SPcYoJUIRgrRWKZiFHMqN_dpwMYdITRcI_KusE77-HxMK6v9jJUTQy3-8CuSyRxoby8OVIiDvYoYGiBhnFo1RHFU05r-5LHvtp8m2FgZxlt80Zfof4P6fJQO3Eu950RD_Nf4Uh34cWLupG6Xp5yHZdIjzg87jPSFk1Rh0xNEOqlKmzyhzfVr6jAp2yGBkbO7t1SZP0dmbgpjDX0OX_k-F5CrlkI_FCdJ0Fve9Hx2qPPACOml0xcZAK6--IuvImF-YlithOE_pYvO9N-GMp9ElES7WEXc4RJ7K4uVKu87KTdT0IbeucEV6xU4zhzWLRasN4OcUxwFE1lKlvRjMvTZ2BefolTY5iYE4IAToOO_uMb0pgiFnguy7HCrp4oeGzrIIl6B7TAYpAqsfYjitLY0Xg8EX0qwUxvzN3brUNpUDpkL7U25FW9BV7TuRZgqF3-e1G67Ws1HLT-nWZTtL-39ZCYiH4nw5jY0EeACURcMfEq47SMj9ntt5WuG-8W8fJfRwGdjjqDGKDmAH5Ontaf2PYYSMmT-aihm6OM7q0Vijp_Ep-mhZg_bVb3c8E5sMq2C2_nsV8D1GogIkqd2SwVZkvHa7Cr9MzJbrGXqbluUJJsIjVdvD-jaYqltfNwwc)
---
In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans...

...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- _**it 's the message of FAITH! **_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it 's happening. _

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we're witnessing is not just growth --**it 's revival. **

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. **

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down." _

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. _**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=765147e047cf4d409e607b6ea921d9ce&_e=78_h8Zx3-Z1BACkDYUkxMSbT87Xny0kSxWRtEB2wOQujCKABXhXiAHfu6LeRAZ3T8g-SPcYoJUIRgrRWKZiFHMqN_dpwMYdITRcI_KusE77-HxMK6v9jJUTQy3-8CuSyRxoby8OVIiDvYoYGiBhnFo1RHFU05r-5LHvtp8m2FgZxlt80Zfof4P6fJQO3Eu950RD_Nf4Uh34cWLupG6Xp5yHZdIjzg87jPSFk1Rh0xNGj-5-nMzXk_K9Bb2nvkhhCvscESc2gF6QEOCvLL9sC-ovQnPzJ60rDFa8AYenGrpFROReFhzv6sZ-NlAb8ycHsq8icxOAWamKE41uMuqZiiQLu0mizLxas-IxOsfwmWnZDFcC_LZGOIqXWJ1vZZuxcwgMqiBqDZYt5eGFVlKZur2inOiRNdcT4nCJtnEbOzqTSCZHLxUxG5aNLkuXWqB-pncF8DE-R1TdUb6nDyEGyPJwV8CFda1PrBU_NOxBe5Rqf6L25FAmwBC_kB8k__gC3wKGceNwWFBJVfCZjk4CDAIzkoGmtVXvCsDzos5usg3DUtOTAhxGKpfFQqxYvJShi5HXE1aqWDwUEFEhV-mkZRQR5twmvCruX1XpgGkiGUC2hOjiS-NSek1HlmJC9UU_Tt1zwzqllV5LG7oku5AoRwbpXTahx1FqKhwRYNCV7HxULSqCvh6hQltiw55Gsr-4w)**

clean_body: In a world that never stops, Charlie did| | | | | Peter, | | Charlie would have wanted you to have this. Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book. The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice. This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans. Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children. By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." His book, Stop, in the Name of God is the fruit of that conviction. When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family. Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive... A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us. I believe you will find this book inspiring. Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans... ...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- it 's the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it 's happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we're witnessing is not just growth --it 's revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down." This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I'll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie's mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122643784/593106245/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzI5MzUwYjktOTNlOS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YTx-wGpfTTOWK98GpmpSFtRJhm7NbDkCzRS8or5kORE=) Team, I’ve had the honor of serving Oregon’s 5th District in Congress for a year now, and since being sworn in, my team and I have hit the ground running to deliver for our communities. We’ve worked to prioritize lowering costs for hardworking families. We’ve fought to safeguard affordable healthcare. We’ve pushed to help small businesses and our local economies thrive. We’ve fought to strengthen our public education system. And we’ve made sure Oregonians' voices are heard by meeting with over 42,000 constituents at the 18 town halls we’ve held since the start of last year. body:
90% of Democrats, most Independents, and 1/5 of Republicans support Medicare For All.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260104-5780-footer&t=1&akid=5780%2E420207%2EaMj9BK)
Peter, we need to take about health care.
Right now, with millions of families experiencing skyrocketing costs, extending ACA subsidies and cancelling the GOP’s Medicaid cuts are essential measures to ensure millions aren’t kicked off their health care in the short term.
But once we’ve done that, we can’t forget that greedy private insurance companies and Republicans have collapsed any semblance of a real health care system. When families are paying $20,000 just for insurance, before they even get health care, they simply can’t afford it — and we HAVE to rebuild a new universal health care system that people _can_ afford: Medicare For All.
These two ideas aren’t mutually exclusive: We can support extending the ACA subsidies in the short term AND fight for a new system that actually works for working families in the long term.
According to new polling that my campaign commissioned, 90% of Democrats, most Independents, and 1/5 of Republicans support Medicare For All, a system where the government provides your insurance card — from birth to death, with comprehensive care.
It’s the only universal plan in Congress and it already has so much support across the country. It will be a defining issue in the midterms, and even in battleground districts, a strong majority of voters — Democrats, independents, and Republicans – back Medicare For All.
**It is time to listen to the demands of the American people and embrace Medicare For All as the health care solution for families struggling to afford to live.** [**If you agree, will you pitch in $3 to help me keep up this fight?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20260104-1.hM16vs&refcode=em20260104-5780&amount=3&t=2&akid=5780%2E420207%2EaMj9BK)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20260104-1.hM16vs&amount=3&refcode=em20260104-5780&t=21&akid=5780%2E420207%2EaMj9BK)**
More and more Members of Congress are coming on to my Medicare For All bill, with 6 new members signing on recently. But we need to keep up the momentum. So to every Republican, independent, and Democrat out there – let’s do this!
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260104-5780-footer&t=22&refcode2=5780_420207_aMj9BK&akid=5780%2E420207%2EaMj9BK)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=5780%2E420207%2EaMj9BK)

PolitiBrawl's Matt Miller asked New York City liberals if they would sign up to take in a Somali migrant so they could stay in the United States amid President Donald Trump's third world immigration crackdown.
**[Watch to see if ANY of them would put their money where their mouth is:](https://substack.com/redirect/846ba6b3-40d6-4053-b6e6-b4a2fab1da2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/846ba6b3-40d6-4053-b6e6-b4a2fab1da2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/846ba6b3-40d6-4053-b6e6-b4a2fab1da2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Communist network launches coordinated propaganda campaign within minutes of Maduro capture**
As U.S. military forces captured Venezuelan leader Nicolas Maduro, a network of self-described Marxist, socialist, and communist organizations **[launched a synchronized information warfare operation,](https://substack.com/redirect/6704d975-b21d-46e7-9bde-694466991b36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with BreakThrough News publishing video at 1:35 a.m. blasting the "illegal bombing campaign" and the ANSWER Coalition issuing a red alert by 2:29 a.m. with slick posters calling supporters to Times Square, demonstrating "the speed and discipline of an organized military operation."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6704d975-b21d-46e7-9bde-694466991b36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Key figures tied to Chinese-aligned businessman orchestrate rapid mobilization:** The operation was coordinated through interconnected organizations including The People's Forum (led by Manolo De Los Santos), ANSWER Coalition (co-founded by Marxist Brian Becker), and CodePink (founded by Jodie Evans, wife of Neville Roy Singham), a U.S.-born tech executive who relocated to Shanghai and whose work critics say aligns with Chinese Communist Party interests, with Congress already investigating this socialist network's ties to Singham.
* **International Peoples ' Assembly serves as command hub for global resistance:** At the center of this domestic operation is the International Peoples' Assembly, functioning as an "umbrella organization and political command-and-control hub" linking communist parties, socialist movements, and state-aligned media worldwide, with coordinating committee members including CodePink, The People's Forum's Popular Education Project, and the Party for Socialism and Liberation, explicitly framing their mission as mobilizing global resistance against "American imperialism."

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7fc79f28-9d9a-426b-92f2-617fefceebf1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Network has decades-long ties to Venezuelan regime:** The relationship between U.S. socialist organizations and Venezuela's government dates back to 2003 when Fidel Castro and Hugo Chavez backed the Francisco de Miranda Front, with De Los Santos organizing pro-Maduro protests in 2019, appearing on Venezuelan state TV, and photographed with Maduro in 2021, while the Party for Socialism and Liberation's Claudia De la Cruz declared at a 2019 Caracas conference that "Venezuela is the epicenter...the personification of the anti-imperialist struggle."

* * *
# **Mamdani 's Democratic Socialist Party demands Maduro's return, launches "Hands Off Venezuela" campaign**
The Democratic Socialists of America **[issued a lengthy statement](https://substack.com/redirect/1b8d79c8-a871-4a4a-94d3-4303dcf6a82d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** demanding "the return of President Nicolas Maduro and First Lady Cilia Flores to Venezuela" and started a "Hands Off Venezuela" campaign to get the "imperialist" United States out of the socialist, oil-rich country, declaring "Solidarity with the people of Venezuela! Solidarity with the Bolivarian Revolution!"
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ffe5a5c-f092-4444-8dc1-edc05e7607ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **DSA claims Trump waging "illegal war" for oil and hegemony:** The left-wing group claims the Trump administration has started "an illegal war" against Venezuela that is "nakedly imperialist" to "install a US puppet government that will give Venezuela's oil resources over to US corporations and to force US hegemony over Latin America," comparing it to the "failed" Iraq war and dismissing evidence of government officials being "narco-terrorists" as a false pretext.
* **NYC Mayor Mamdani personally called Trump to oppose Maduro removal:** Mamdani, a DSA member who is NYC's first socialist mayor, said he personally called President Trump on Saturday to express his opposition to removing Maduro, claiming it's a violation of international law, as his comrades demand restoration of diplomatic relations with the "Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela" and immediate withdrawal of all US forces from the Caribbean.

* * *
# Ben Shapiro breaks down Trump's triumph in Venezuela and what's next
"President Trump said the United States is going to 'run Venezuela,'... **[What does that mean?" ](https://substack.com/redirect/4c185b3e-ec78-4134-8e59-4d8ad540ece8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c450e043-e1fe-4139-a355-16d9cb3758f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

[Every now and again, I rewatch war movies that I watched growing up. For me, those movies include "Gettysburg," "We Were Soldiers," and "Glory." These movies, among others, sparked my interest in military history, which in turn got me interested in the U.S. military.](https://substack.com/redirect/dcc79438-4298-4bc3-814c-b0ccc924b0de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: Venezuelan drug terrorists

Peter,

Since President Trump was sworn into office, the entire world has come to realize that when it comes to stopping the flow of drugs, the President means business.

**Under his leadership, we’ve seized far more fentanyl and cocaine than under the Biden Administration.**

But Democrats in Congress and elsewhere are crying foul, saying we don’t have the legal authority to launch strikes on drug kingpins making a beeline for our shores to sell their contraband.

_**I’ve been involved in many military operations like the ones currently underway, and I can assure you, we are on solid ground.**_

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

A man cruising down the highway — hands nowhere near the wheel — just chilling with his laptop. | | | [-](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=1cbf0fdec99f4454b01980be04a6bdbf&_e=VwwVAhYc-GtDJ55xcyxDZGu8Q1pdlKripJkkrGAOwvf7Zi6gAK-mSafBD-ze3cqB4EWui3HBztAsFvnhGH9G1NLQcEHd-wp9_c9w7uFiikgq2iuqfExpmqmfIQMldc1Py6_lwBo9lwrPlbqb6fGa349wzZ51Eimxcc6jL_qodlEHnQWWeqZ-bX4b1y0KrDxE02RyQS48oDly2I2ENYClO1BcOINi_WsluDFArAZ9TjSXBCMbboVWLJK2fAzorLymlUp4aBLbr98iB3UZabKVlRlI8qlYiQ_ae91qR7Bdpa1PKymZxY_GnbctJsrVAaJ2WlIUMmvy0NH1ehQH80YaB22Fy_HQ9_AtnTiTgH0JgEqDMHIKeFl7ugXELje2jvdb)

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: I just saw footage that doesn’t feel real. A man cruising down the highway — hands nowhere near the wheel — just chilling with his laptop. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | I just saw footage that doesn’t feel real. subject: Do you know how much our billionaire opponent gave his campaign?

body:
Our competitive race is now even harder to win.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40658%2E3422442%2E52tOyd)
Peter,
Our billionaire opponent recently gave his campaign $20 MILLION from his personal fortune. _That move instantly made this competitive race even harder to win._
Elections should be about ideas. Each candidate says how they would govern, and voters decide who they like best. Instead, one billionaire is trying to buy his way into office by blanketing the airwaves with ads and boxing out other voices.
Katie Porter isn’t a billionaire. She’s a single mom who can’t wave around a checkbook to become California’s next governor. She’s relying on everyday people to support her because she’s going to fight for them as governor.
The truth is, this race isn’t a walk in the park. The field is crowded, and being a billionaire gives our opponent a financial advantage. But we can counter that with a surge of grassroots donations to kick off 2026 strong.
**[Can you chip in $5 to help us overcome our billionaire opponent’s nearly unlimited self-funding and make sure we stay competitive in this race?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260104_1_ak.DJXSeT&refcode=em20260104-40658&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40658%2E3422442%2E52tOyd)**

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Sorry to be so direct
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hey Derek, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking: Can you split a donation of $5 to my reelection campaign and John Fetterman's today?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52483?t=1001&akid=10514%2E434096%2ERgE1Mu

Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule.

And I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won.

That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re already spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me.

There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021.

So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, for all of us.

If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign and John Fetterman's today.

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52483?t=1002&akid=10514%2E434096%2ERgE1Mu

The campaign will be brutal.

But this team wins the hardest battles.

We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible.

Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority.

And we will win again — with your help.

Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule. And I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won. That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re already spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me. There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021. So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, for all of us. If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign and John Fetterman's today. The campaign will be brutal. But this team wins the hardest battles. We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible. Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority. And we will win again — with your help. Please: send $5 to my reelection campaign and John Fetterman's today. With gratitude, Senator Jon Ossoff

name: Jasmine Clark
subject: RE: the Trump Administration’s latest attack on healthcare workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260104em-nurse-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260104em-nurse-rs]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260104em-nurse-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260104em-nurse-rs]
As a professor at Emory’s nursing school, I’ve dedicated my career to training the next generation of nurses — the people who will care for us when we’re sick, deliver our babies, respond to emergencies, and literally save our lives.
So I was outraged when I saw the Trump Administration’s latest attack on healthcare workers:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260104em-nurse-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260104em-nurse-rs]
Trump’s Department of Education just reclassified nursing as not a professional degree, slashing federal loan access for advanced nursing degrees nationwide.
Let me say that again: They are telling nurses—NURSES—that their work isn’t “professional” enough to deserve the same support as dentists, veterinarians, chiropractors, optometrists, and theologians.
But it’s not just about a title. The actual consequences will be devastating:
→ Graduate nursing students will lose access to the federal loans they need to become nurse practitioners, nurse anesthetists, midwives, and clinical specialists.
→ Nationwide nursing shortages will grow worse.
→ And patients — the people who rely on nurses the most — will pay the price.
This is a direct attack on the health care workforce. And it’s one more reminder why we need scientists, educators, and health care professionals IN Congress — not politicians who don’t understand (or don’t care about) the consequences of their actions.
I’m running for Congress because I’ve seen what happens when politicians who know nothing about medicine make decisions that endanger patients and disrespect the healthcare workers who keep this country running. But I can’t fight this fight alone. So please, will you donate $10, $25, or whatever you can to help me win this race and bring a fresh and needed perspective to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260104em-nurse-rs]
DONATE NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260104em-nurse-rs]
Thank you,
Dr. Jasmine Clark
Democratic Candidate for Georgia's 13th District
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260104em-nurse-rs]

subject: There’s still a way to stop Trump’s plan to dismantle the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
We’re creating pressure Congress cannot ignore!

|

_⚠️Yes,_Donald Trump fired more than 10,000 USPS workers..._
⚠️Yes, his administration _wants to privatize the Postal Service..._
⚠️And yes, _post offices across the country are struggling_ after massive funding cuts..._

**But here’s the truth, Peter: this fight is not over.**

There is still a way to stop Trump’s plan to dismantle the USPS and it starts with people like you speaking out together.

_One signature may seem small. But when thousands of Democrats stand united, it creates the pressure Congress cannot ignore!_

name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: ICE needs your help Peter!
body:
Their mission is being jeopardized.

| | | | Peter, please note a vital task lies ahead.
NEVER BEFORE HAS YOUR SUPPORT BEEN MORE CRITICAL.
Once loyal patriots are turning against ICE, joining the Left's rigorous agenda to ABOLISH them for good.
Peter, the brave agents of ICE are on the front lines, fighting to protect our borders and enforce our laws. But without immediate support from patriots like you, their mission to protect our borders and enforce our laws is being jeopardized.
We are calling upon you, patriot, who was hand-selected for this response, to weigh in immediately. Your support is CRITICAL to push back against these attacks and restore the law and order necessary to keep our country safe.
Please stand with ICE by completing the Official ICE Support Survey below. Your answers will be shared directly with those fighting to ensure ICE can continue its vital work.
The clock is ticking. If you love this country and everything it stands for, you must act now before the anti-ICE mob becomes too powerful to stop.
OFFICIAL ICE SUPPORT SURVEY
Name: PeterEmail: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-ojNQKK8w)Due Date: 11:59 TONIGHTResponse: AWAITING1\. Do you support ICE being a crucial defense of the United States of America?
a. Yesb. No
2\. How important is it to you that ICE enforces the act of removing illegal immigrants from the US?
a. Very Important b. Important c. Not Important
3\. Do you support requiring all individuals seeking legal status to undergo a mandatory security vetting process before being allowed into the country?
a. Yes, absolutely.b. No, they should be processed quickly.
4\. SIGNATURE REQUIRED TO VERIFY YOUR RESPONSE: | [ SIGN HERE >> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._gg)
---
[ TAKE SURVEY NOW ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._CRlJ2yg)

name: Voter Action Project Polling
subject: Your view on the potential for election fraud?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
WaPo - The truth about election fraud: It’s rare [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/WaPo_TruthElectionFraudRare.png]
As the 2024 elections got underway, many Americans, in particular those who identify as Republicans, were increasingly fearful that the outcome would be affected or even determined by election fraud.
Thousands of poll watchers were dispatched. Drop boxes were under surveillance. A Fox News poll conducted recently still found that 55 percent of those surveyed were extremely or very concerned about voter fraud despite lacking any evidence of fraud. Among self-identified Republicans, nearly three-quarters said they were that concerned.
Team: Are you worried about voter fraud?

As the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_But that’s no longer the case!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses. _**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY.**
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
The situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---

clean_body: It’s official... I’m not going down without a FIGHT! | Dear Friend, No pardon. No lifeline. The Left thinks they finally got me. I’m being put on TRIAL by a vengeful, bloodthirsty Democrat Attorney General who wants to throw me in prison for 20 YEARS. And because it’s in state court, a federal pardon from the President is powerless! But it’s not in my blood to cower or surrender. I will always FIGHT! That’s why I officially filed a NEW Defense Trust in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me more power to fight the Left’s ongoing legal warfare against me. Today, I am asking you to become an Honorary Founding Member and help me marshal the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team to win this battle and WALK FREE! When my trial ends and the jury reads those two powerful words of my verdict... “NOT GUILTY!” ...I will know exactly who to thank: the kind souls like YOU who stood by my side on Day One to fight this grave injustice. As the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... But that’s no longer the case! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses. Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! The situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Defense Trust as an Honorary Founding Member. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust | 3300 S Dixie Hwy West Palm Beach, FL 33405 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
