name: David Hogg
subject: Want to know one thing that helps me sleep at night?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I take this job pretty seriously, Peter.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260104-1&t=1&akid=3008%2E587540%2Erssi7d)
Peter,
I take this job pretty seriously.
I spend a lot of time thinking about how to help every single one of the candidates we endorse win their elections. And you want to know one thing that helps me sleep at night?
It’s knowing that, since our launch in 2023, **more than 15,000 of our grassroots supporters** have signed up to make monthly recurring donations to Leaders We Deserve.
**[These donations are crucial to sustaining a movement like ours, so today I wanted to reach out and ask if you would set up a monthly recurring donation too.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2774?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260104_1_sleep.7S3uac&refcode=em20260104-3008&amount=5&t=2&akid=3008%2E587540%2Erssi7d)**
_Use the links in this email to start a recurring donation to Leaders We Deserve._
**[Donate »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2774?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260104_1_sleep.7S3uac&amount=5&refcode=em20260104-3008&t=3&akid=3008%2E587540%2Erssi7d)**
Here’s why these recurring donations are so helpful:
* They allow us to set a baseline for what we bring in each month, so we can budget that money toward our most pressing priorities.

* They help us get to work well before Election Day. A month before the election is too late to hire and train organizers, buy TV ads, and compete with more established, well-financed campaigns.

* They help create a snowball effect for our candidates. A lot of donors and organizations look at how much early money candidates raise to inform whether they should get involved, and recurring donations let us back young, progressive candidates early on to show their credibility.

**[So if you’re ready to elect more of the leaders we deserve, please sign up to make a monthly recurring donation of any amount that works for you today. It will help more than you know!](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2774?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260104_1_sleep.7S3uac&refcode=em20260104-3008&amount=5&t=4&akid=3008%2E587540%2Erssi7d)**
Thanks again for all your support,
David Hogg
P.S. Can’t commit to a monthly donation today? Not a problem. **[If you can make a one-time contribution of $5 or any amount at all, you’ll make a big difference in helping us reach our goals and elect the next generation of leaders.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260104_1_sleep.PkSF1i&refcode=em20260104-3008&amount=5&t=5&akid=3008%2E587540%2Erssi7d)**
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260104-1&t=6&refcode2=3008_587540_rssi7d&akid=3008%2E587540%2Erssi7d)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=3008%2E587540%2Erssi7d)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=3008%2E587540%2Erssi7d)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: JD Vance
subject: I consider Peter one of my closest advisors

It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get off their asses and do the work they were sent to Washington for. VoteVets is DEMANDING Republican leadership in Congress to exercise their Constitutional authority and support a vote on whether or not Trump is authorized to use military force in Venezuela.
#
Peter —
For far, far too long, Congress has delegated its authority to Donald Trump. This ends now.
The people of the United States do not want another war. And it’s not just Democrats or Independents — it’s Republicans, too. Trump calls himself the “Peace President,” and millions of people voted for Trump to prevent any more forever wars. He’s betrayed their trust, he’s starting another war, and it’s their kids who will go off to fight if we don’t stop this.
It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get off their asses and do the work they were sent to Washington for. Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3f7c0a5fe839434584c50410df0ae519&_e=f9qn4vaWSWtj9-JH2npRysuKQ30jPb5x67oUTZAq-1mcYj3RP_Dio1kUaSndyP4P_YQRXXI51fhDcT9Q1qQ_yhkoDlXtgs1KiBbeAcvhqj5rkXXKyk2doryE2EnZz6VyuYOJsrkYOR8gDFVIQKVcUhGnPYYfUyjCYTEyGacAjqg7S40e-V7pB12ErcJG6wManyHI4tXdi2ZnuaoB9gjPKgCWXaWCrzfJUTHFzy6ZUTEsdjzXmmPNayJjzhTivlTxOEAFYge8jG0UNTd9tRn4xha2QqLsBAlfP1a-9U782PRhiYeJ_0PMny8cpnzMqH80vCsYpU3tSMqUP4anBHNvAkMt-lnEDU9s_xFEsIqeoXe7MpC6VV0i4hg47P1_kAEDM76boqlscEHXtANRRMf_Gh79PIO3R-LpFCDJ41WqkVusdaUPHTmw6UN6qR3tDl1dZo9LuDJU6RiAtCUnjf_bhZSG1cL-Q8vfhP3H_UZ7YZ5NL3gfKzSuTsFqFqCQ7qZDGXqAMUAOHuh4LPX6cw4uiarhE-65opYO-nRhrqbkv_s_7f4u3C-UhorF4LqEFtt0)

In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2026 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

body:

| | | | First, my son Don Jr. reached out.
Then, my team reached out.
Then, I reached out by email.
**We were convinced that you no-longer use this email.**
That’s why I even reached out to you by mail 4 TIMES - even in the snow!
---

My team says that my letters might’ve gotten buried in the snow!
I really need to share something important with you, that’s why I’m so persistent.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is the work of a lifetime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
I have a humble request to make today.
#
Peter, I have spent my working life trying to make people's lives better, and it has been more than worth it. **[Now, I am running for the U.S. Senate to continue that work, but our toss-up race is getting closer, and I need your help to win. Split a donation between our campaign and State Democrats Committee today to say you’re with me.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99071?refcode=em20260104-9904&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9904%2E614464%2EQ5sP4l)**
I’m proud of what we have achieved together: expanding Medicaid. Getting raises for public school teachers. Investing in our clean energy economy.
The trust that North Carolinians have placed in me has meant so much. It gave me the opportunity to serve my home and allowed us to make real progress.
**I didn’t plan to go to Washington, but I got in this race for the U.S. Senate because that progress is on the line, along with so much more. For our state and for all Americans.**
I will not sit by and watch while extreme politicians tear away the rights that so many fought for so long to secure. I will do everything in my power to protect our country. **I know that this is the work of a lifetime.**
And it is work that I cannot do alone, so I’m humbly asking you to stand with me.
**[Peter, I am asking you to invest in our work by splitting a contribution between our campaign and State Democrats Committee today. National Republicans are rallying around my far-right opponent to try to defeat me, and I can’t overcome them alone. We can’t let Michael Whatley gain any more ground.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99071?refcode=em20260104-9904&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9904%2E614464%2EQ5sP4l)**
I know that we can win together, just like we have before.
Gratefully,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99071?refcode=em20260104-9904&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9904%2E614464%2EQ5sP4l)

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=4&akid=9904%2E614464%2EQ5sP4l).
clean_body: I have a humble request to make today. Peter, I have spent my working life trying to make people's lives better, and it has been more than worth it. I’m proud of what we have achieved together: expanding Medicaid. Getting raises for public school teachers. Investing in our clean energy economy. The trust that North Carolinians have placed in me has meant so much. It gave me the opportunity to serve my home and allowed us to make real progress. I didn’t plan to go to Washington, but I got in this race for the U.S. Senate because that progress is on the line, along with so much more. For our state and for all Americans. I will not sit by and watch while extreme politicians tear away the rights that so many fought for so long to secure. I will do everything in my power to protect our country. I know that this is the work of a lifetime. And it is work that I cannot do alone, so I’m humbly asking you to stand with me. I know that we can win together, just like we have before. Gratefully, Roy Cooper Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: “This isn’t a job for a mom.”
body:
[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/83?t=1001&akid=3490%2E898137%2EtR7UqM ][IMG]

Team — I have
a story to share with you.

It’s a bit of a long one, so if you’d rather support my campaign with a
[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/107?c0=mam-em-sept2025-mom-vid.iyFZlT&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260104_PM1_V1_S1&t=1002&akid=3490%2E898137%2EtR7UqM ]donation of any amount right now, I’d appreciate it.

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-sept2025-mom-vid.zsjMfc&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260104_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=3490%2E898137%2EtR7UqM ]DONATE

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-sept2025-mom-vid.zsjMfc&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260104_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=3490%2E898137%2EtR7UqM ]Mallory on a podium

One day in October of 2018, I knocked on a door in a winding cul-de-sac in
Troy.

The woman who answered was around my mom’s age. I introduced myself and I
told her that I was running to be her State Senator. I handed her my
literature, and she turned it over a few times.

“Are you married?” she asked.

Yes, I told her. Then I pointed to the picture of my husband, Ray, and our
dog in the literature.

“Do you have any kids?”

No — we had just been married the year before at Eastern Market, right
before I filed to run for office.

“Well, are you going to have kids? And when? And how many?”

She told me that her own daughter was pregnant and that it would be her
first grandchild. Then she stopped me.

“I’m sorry,” she said. “I need to know that my senator is in the office
representing me the whole time. I can’t vote for you. This isn’t a job for
a mom.”

I thought about her own daughter and how she needed an advocate, how she
deserved a voice. Of course, women could do this. Of course, moms should
do this.

But I want to admit something to you — this can get draining.
You see, last summer, during the dreaded gap between the last week of
summer school and the first week of regular school for my daughter’s
pre-school, we messed up.

Somehow, my husband and I timed it completely wrong. In trying to balance
everything, we completely screwed up the dates. We found ourselves
scrambling that week for child care, for someone to be with our brilliant
and endlessly energetic four-year-old, so that we could maintain two
full-time jobs on top of a statewide U.S. Senate campaign.

So many women know that gap.

I found myself worried about telling my campaign team, about stressing
them out, thinking that they wished they worked for any other kind of
candidate. One without a kid. One who doesn’t have to worry about who’s
watching her young child, knowing how hard they worked to arrange a full
schedule of fundraisers, meet and greets, union training facility tours,
and events.

That week, I found myself deeply understanding why so many women just
quit.

Team, we
do this work to write a New American Dream and to ensure that it’s not
just some relic of the past.

We do all of this work knowing that it will mean time away from our
families.

There will be weeks when you find yourself struggling to find childcare,
where you want to tear your hair out. Weeks when you think so much about
how much easier it would be to just quit.

But you don’t. Because we matter. Our voices matter. Because you know that
you can make it easier for the next woman who comes after you. And because
you know that there are so many people who know what you are going through
and who have your back.

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/107?c0=mam-em-sept2025-mom-vid.iyFZlT&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260104_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=3490%2E898137%2EtR7UqM ]As your Senator, I promise to always have yours. If you’re able, please
consider making a contribution today so we can keep writing a New American
Dream together.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/6?c0=mam-em-sept2025-mom-vid.tiCblz&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260104_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=3490%2E898137%2EtR7UqM ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/7?c0=mam-em-sept2025-mom-vid.rGDhec&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260104_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=3490%2E898137%2EtR7UqM ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/8?c0=mam-em-sept2025-mom-vid.cCLKTF&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260104_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=3490%2E898137%2EtR7UqM ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/9?c0=mam-em-sept2025-mom-vid.910eVT&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260104_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=3490%2E898137%2EtR7UqM ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/10?c0=mam-em-sept2025-mom-vid.7q3his&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260104_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=3490%2E898137%2EtR7UqM ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/11?c0=mam-em-sept2025-mom-vid.tFvsg1&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260104_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=3490%2E898137%2EtR7UqM ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you,

Mallory

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-sept2025-mom-vid.zsjMfc&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260104_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=3490%2E898137%2EtR7UqM ]DONATE

name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: No legal authority. No transparency. No way.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260104em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260104em]
Something deeply troubling is happening inside our federal government, and every voter in Oregon deserves to know the truth.
The US Department of Justice has been requesting your private voter information — including your date of birth, partial Social Security number, and driver’s license number — without legal authority, without transparency, and without any explanation of how they intend to use it.
I refused to hand over that data.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/CfMP30xwgUWZNBhKV-mlDw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CfMP30xwgUWZNBhKV-mlDw2]
No legal authority. No transparency. No way.
What’s more, now we’ve learned that the USDOJ has already been sharing personal voter data with the Department of Homeland Security and funneling it into the SAVE program — a system that watchdogs have repeatedly called inaccurate, insecure, and unreliable.
This is exactly why I said no from the start. And why I’m still saying no — even as they sue me for it.
I will not allow your personal information to be misused to intimidate voters, target immigrants, or tear families apart. That will never be Oregon’s way.
Along with Colorado’s Secretary of State and eight other Secretaries of State across the country, I’ve demanded answers directly from the Attorney General and the Secretary of Homeland Security.
But the federal government needs to hear from you too.
If you agree that personal information should not be used to intimidate voters, target immigrants, or tear families apart, please add your name to my petition now: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CfMP30xwgUWZNBhKV-mlDw2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CfMP30xwgUWZNBhKV-mlDw2]
Oregonians — and all Americans — deserve to know how their data is being used.
We’re standing up because your privacy, your rights, and your vote matter.
Thank you for being part of this fight.
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
P.S. You can read the press release regarding our demand for answers from US DOJ and Department of Homeland Security here [https://apps.oregon.gov/oregon-newsroom/OR/SOS/Posts/Post/secretaries-demand-answers-from-us-department-of-justice-us-department-homeland-security-voter-data] .
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260104em]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

body:

Peter,

My name is **Wes Climer** , and I’m running for Congress in South Carolina’s 5th District because Democrats left Washington a broken mess—and we need proven conservative fighters who don’t flinch under pressure.

I’m a proud husband, father, and lifelong conservative from Rock Hill, South Carolina. I’ve spent my career creating jobs, fighting special interest groups, defending the sanctity of life, and standing up for our families and communities.

When I was first elected to the South Carolina Senate, my goal wasn’t to make friends. I ran to make a difference, fight deeply entrenched special interest groups, and defend our state’s taxpayers.

That’s why, when politicians tried to sneak through an outrageous pay raise for themselves, _**I didn’t just complain. I took the legislature to court to stop it - AND I WON**_. Because to me, public service is about you, not politicians lining their pockets.

When I look at Washington, I see a Leftist establishment selling us out and doing everything they can to obstruct President Trump’s America First vision. _**If we don’t act now, our freedoms, our values, and our children’s future are at risk.**_

Peter, I can’t win this fight alone. I need to know every Conservative is in my corner as we wage this fight. [**That’s why I’m asking you to endorse my fight to send a no-nonsense Conservative to take on the Left in Washington.**](http://links.wesclimerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f177b16779e64cf19860a2364869c6f3&_m=4b434ff9cfad49829892f3b1ca4f06ae&_e=uhxezdVGsUAvCznA4hBBjdirNqjBf6GN_9E3nxng3w53dV2x-pyQz5yOdUH5Yl8YvUaiysAq3WmajfIwCy1x-BGXebrrntaJWOvVShD23FB2iUPZb5v4698P-WZt0d3_ZvmmkgphwIpH1RzFZLVXx21xLHe4zACgnyZ9PjvpVQEC5rK1Whnx7Mo1LjSJ1W3MLjV8zURgVZ6iTp-_5vwO7BT85FIiQKGlqFql2ZLhWe7AD-KRvR83zqZNp1GCt9pg9UMhDE4KmOhg0TgMxrv8c1QpkaG2pqVWbhrrnqU8EQIAuMVYrpOs3D7bXT_RfX_1_egJAS1Sajd2ddybbHqGsJbdEMzfGm_Zj5_NAVTrtWDwYG7OP_dPaqfH80R6_PLWUsihaoLSdv1CEQAI96mc7g3sGOWYmhpUm7fb50RjlHSA2WN4Nh1uIAv2a7wPTPl_9gOT7Kef6Fq6GZO_ns6sTjPIXyH8SxMQQ0iVP1nLMMcRMdIrIe7t9cligrXJFaDLblK--HeS4DtgK3ojpvwv6RT5iPrFkD-o3a7oUxarpYLPOdh08iu9usNAMNZl2VaQ6_JNq7mQEhmVgKDrNS9BnI0K0lt5qZs4D-r8RAYode8DU1KTdDfBAJySWMkw3C-BCi6IN9nmF3j0xqvn3IxNYp4HnL28u6jGjflSceoruUy4qysLNLfxFibYWv-QDdCqYJnJzduIY_ll8hTYyRTH1p46i6I4ZCbMevEJLu6q6o9qUcXaPpKXc740tj8VNInS20VNrGajU1qwgSBkhBdv2_IPYLg-uq5H5HY6ndprrS2ZphnvQZLlNlOr_a9cz56zk73-HfFTnAAN71aPpj_NWrskPZlNZO7kBGelys7nlTy8nMdU5ClTVOmW2EU05SnBj2lCBkfgTrW8WzXED3xBTjV5UWLSv0FttCSF5xXKknnnGqfTUThiuz3tFP1BYfS6leHT525VrV8qGIZbpaty9EN60YQoIciOzqJzR9jsFvObyAa8gRr_udypmQG4vyBgrHYVQ6xiq6P26zNLzpFwVE20cItYMQMWndgD-eytaAcUcy31_vzd9PdtNnA7TG7O)

| | **WES' STORY**
_Wes Climer is a husband, father of five, business owner and public servant who believes in doing the hard work, telling the truth and never backing down from a fight. Raised in South Carolina and now representing York County in the State Senate, Wes has built a reputation for being one of the most effective and conservative voices in Columbia. He’s not in politics to climb the ladder or play the game. He’s in it to fix what’s broken.

Wes isn’t just a principled conservative. He’s a proven leader. Whether it’s stopping legislative pay raises, delivering road funding for York County or pushing for real school choice, Wes has shown he’s willing to take on anyone, Republicans or Democrats, to do what’s right.

clean_body: I’m running for Congress in South Carolina’s 5th District because Democrats left Washington a broken mess—and we need proven conservative fighters who don’t flinch under pressure. | Peter, My name is Wes Climer , and I’m running for Congress in South Carolina’s 5th District because Democrats left Washington a broken mess—and we need proven conservative fighters who don’t flinch under pressure. I’m a proud husband, father, and lifelong conservative from Rock Hill, South Carolina. I’ve spent my career creating jobs, fighting special interest groups, defending the sanctity of life, and standing up for our families and communities. When I was first elected to the South Carolina Senate, my goal wasn’t to make friends. I ran to make a difference, fight deeply entrenched special interest groups, and defend our state’s taxpayers. That’s why, when politicians tried to sneak through an outrageous pay raise for themselves, I didn’t just complain. I took the legislature to court to stop it - AND I WON. Because to me, public service is about you, not politicians lining their pockets. When I look at Washington, I see a Leftist establishment selling us out and doing everything they can to obstruct President Trump’s America First vision. If we don’t act now, our freedoms, our values, and our children’s future are at risk. Peter, I can’t win this fight alone. I need to know every Conservative is in my corner as we wage this fight. Time is short. Your support at this early stage will send a clear message to Democrats and special interest groups that we won’t be intimidated. Thank you, Wes Climer | | WES' STORY Wes Climer is a husband, father of five, business owner and public servant who believes in doing the hard work, telling the truth and never backing down from a fight. Raised in South Carolina and now representing York County in the State Senate, Wes has built a reputation for being one of the most effective and conservative voices in Columbia. He’s not in politics to climb the ladder or play the game. He’s in it to fix what’s broken. Wes isn’t just a principled conservative. He’s a proven leader. Whether it’s stopping legislative pay raises, delivering road funding for York County or pushing for real school choice, Wes has shown he’s willing to take on anyone, Republicans or Democrats, to do what’s right. | Paid for by Climer for Congress

The White House confirmed that they’re drafting a new executive order to restrict Americans' right to vote by mail.

_Despite Trump’s efforts to sow distrust in our electoral system, here’s what we know to be _actually_ true:_

–Nearly a third of Americans used mail-in voting to cast their ballots in the 2024 election

–Experts say that easier access to ballots leads to higher turnout in our elections

–Millions of mail-in ballots have been cast safely over the years!

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The Trial of my Life begins Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
There comes a point in every man’s life...
| Dear Fellow Patriot,
---
There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you.
---

No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial this Monday , I know with absolute confidence that history will say: “Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.” I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump. Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my own. That’s why I officially filed a NEW Defense Trust in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me more power to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE – with my trial beginning on January 5. Fellow Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit. But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get. I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America. With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and WON! But, if you can’t give right now (I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, and you likely have a lot on your plate and your mind), then please just carry on with your day. Thank you and God Bless you! Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

But you don’t have to let interest run the show.| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | High‐interest debt moves fast — faster than most budgets can keep up. name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
subject: Absolutely pummeled...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
Friends,

As you read this, Jon Ossoff is getting absolutely pummeled by attack ads in Georgia. Republicans have spent more than $10 million on TV and online already. It’s ridiculous.

Why so much money, this far from Election Day?

Because Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state won by Trump. That is why Republicans are hitting him so hard, so early in the campaign.

And it’s why we’re coming to you with this request to help fight back.

If Jon is going to defend this seat, we really need to keep hitting our fundraising goals, and donations to emails like this are a huge part of how it happens.

Can Jon Ossoff count on you to split $10, $50 or whatever you can afford to help him lay the foundation for a winning Senate reelection campaign here in Georgia? Your donation will be split between his reelection campaign and Off the Sidelines. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q12026_ots-ossoff-split?amount=10]

DONATE NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q12026_ots-ossoff-split?amount=10]

We wish we didn’t have to ask at all, but Citizens United opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into our elections.

That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections.

And also it’s why campaigns like ours have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations from the very start.

Because if we don’t, we run the risk of our message getting drowned out by a flood of Super PAC spending.

So here’s the truth:

Jon needs our help today .

He is literally MAGA’s #1 target.

They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book.

So yes, this election will be tough.

But this team knows how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.

Let’s do it again.

Please, use this link to support Jon’s reelection campaign and Off the Sidelines. Every donation counts. Every donation sends a powerful message to MAGA that we’re ready to fight and win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q12026_ots-ossoff-split?amount=10]

DONATE $10 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q12026_ots-ossoff-split?amount=10]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q12026_ots-ossoff-split]

Thank you!

- Team Ossoff© 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: Looking for your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter -- We wanted to make sure you saw James’ request for your input on our policy agenda.
This is a movement of, by and for people. So it’s important to us to know what your priorities and ideas are.
[**Can you take a minute to fill out our issues survey? We’re going to go through the results with James soon.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-jan26?source=em260104-1-ak&refcode2=368.1347274.B-r1L6&t=1&akid=368%2E1347274%2EB-r1L6)**
Team Talarico
* * *
Peter --
We’re building a U.S. Senate campaign of, by, and for the people.
A big part of that is focusing on the issues that our communities care about most.
We’re not outsourcing our policy agenda to DC think tanks or lobbyists.
As a state lawmaker, my biggest policy victories — from capping insulin costs, to funding our public schools, to bringing down the cost of housing and rent -- were rooted in my own experiences and the experiences of my neighbors.
So as we continue to shape our policy agenda, I want to get your input and hear your ideas.
[**Can you take two minutes to complete our issue survey to share your priorities with us? It’s important to me that we hear from as many people as possible.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-jan26?source=em260104-1-ak&refcode2=368.1347274.B-r1L6&t=2&akid=368%2E1347274%2EB-r1L6)
[ TAKE OUR SURVEY ](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-jan26?source=em260104-1-ak&refcode2=368.1347274.B-r1L6&t=3&akid=368%2E1347274%2EB-r1L6)
I’m going everywhere and having conversations with anyone willing to have a dialogue about what our families and communities need.
But even if you can’t make it to one of our events, I want to make sure you have a voice in this campaign.
[**If you have two minutes, take our issues survey today to make your voice heard. My team and I will review the results soon.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-jan26?source=em260104-1-ak&refcode2=368.1347274.B-r1L6&t=4&akid=368%2E1347274%2EB-r1L6)
[ TAKE OUR SURVEY ](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-jan26?source=em260104-1-ak&refcode2=368.1347274.B-r1L6&t=5&akid=368%2E1347274%2EB-r1L6)
James

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=6&akid=368%2E1347274%2EB-r1L6) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=7&refcode2=368_1347274_B-r1L6&akid=368%2E1347274%2EB-r1L6)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=8&akid=368%2E1347274%2EB-r1L6).

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Wall Street Journal on Mississippi Success
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/mcppwsj?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,
Mississippi has had a string of successes recently – and they are starting to get national attention!

With all the busy things happening over Christmas and New Year, you might have missed this recent opinion piece in **The Wall Street Journal** (December 29, 2025) by William McGurn, titled _"Mississippi's Capitalist Awakening"_. It spotlights the free-market reforms that are transforming our state for the better and highlights the work of the Mississippi Center for Public Policy (MCPP).

**If you'd like to read the full article, click on the image below:**
---

body:

That’s right -- four quarters. That may seem like a very small donation, but let us explain.
Our opponent, John Sununu, has the full backing of corporate PACs and right-wing billionaires, and they’re **_“all-in”_** to defeat Chris Pappas and flip New Hampshire blue.
So what can $1 do in the face of all that? When you give $1, and another person gives $1, and another, and another, **it really starts to add up.**

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: Tylenol does NOT cause autism…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Donald Trump is many things. Most of which would not be nice for me to say out loud. But a doctor? Definitely not.

At a national press conference, he stood at a podium, tried (and failed spectacularly) to pronounce “acetaminophen,” and declared that Tylenol use during pregnancy causes autism.

**_That’s not medicine. That’s quackery._**

As a pediatrician, I can confidently say that the research is clear, the medical guidance is consistent, and families can trust the experts — NOT the propaganda from a man who once suggested that people should _inject themselves with bleach._

And while Trump spreads disinformation, Lindsey Graham nods along. He never stands up, never pushes back, never defends families who deserve the truth. Because Lindsey Graham is spineless.

The real prescription? Stop taking medical advice from Donald Trump, and stop letting Lindsey Graham enable his dangerous lies.

South Carolina is long overdue for a Senator who listens to doctors and scientists, NOT conspiracy theorists. With your help, I’ll be that Senator.

[**_So please, will you split a donation of just $6, the price of a bottle of Tylenol 😉, between my campaign and Maggie Hassan so we can make sure science, not conspiracy theories, guide our politics? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122649269/593126118/368619964?amount=6&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.04_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzhkYjU2OS1jMWU5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cU03CvHYEcbUDXy6r96ltpHB63Pi3Dq_RBpxmRvU5U=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Annie Andrews and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $6 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122649270/593126119/368619964?express_lane=true&amount=6&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.04_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzhkYjU2OS1jMWU5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cU03CvHYEcbUDXy6r96ltpHB63Pi3Dq_RBpxmRvU5U=)

name: Bob Brooks
subject: In 2026, career politicians are out. Snowplow-driving firemen are in.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB BROOKS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Let this be the year we get some real working class representation down in DC

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122649428/593126654/966921121?refcode=email_010425_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjAxOTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTU4Yjg5ZjMtYzFlOS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9rboX2TGkna6cwHmx8z3jvp6DOSUKf_5MUcN-VkQkvA=) Peter, I know there's a lot going on right now but today, I really just want to say thank you. **We came together and we hit our big end-of-year fundraising goal.** Last month alone, literally thousands of folks stepped up and chipped in. Every contribution represents a belief in a brighter future for working class people. A future where life is actually affordable and healthcare is provided as a human right. Our average contribution in December? **$27.** That’s what a people-powered campaign looks like. Now we’re starting this new year with the wind at our backs. **In 2026, career politicians are out. Snowplow-driving firemen are in.** Let’s take this movement all the way to the halls of Congress. Thank you. Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been...
---
| | | | [Beth Farnham for Congress](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com&sr=0&signature=234e71905ce6fc7ea848d3ba9fc507a0&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z) | [Read on blog](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2026%2F01%2F04%2Fdistrict-round-up-01-04-26%2F&sr=0&signature=a3dde1b1e8ac5f402ba61472b97ce174&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z) or [Reader](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wordpress.com%2Freader%2Fblogs%2F213069660%2Fposts%2F6052&sr=0&signature=0552318fb63e1522cbb408733290c421&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)

# [District Round-up 01.04.26](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2026%2F01%2F04%2Fdistrict-round-up-01-04-26%2F&sr=0&signature=a3dde1b1e8ac5f402ba61472b97ce174&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
---
By **Elizabeth Farnham** on January 4, 2026
---
| Dear Neighbor,
---
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: <https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1>
---
|
---
Happy New Year!
---
PA-13 you and I did amazing things in 2025 and in 2026, we’ll do even more!
---
Thank you for showing up and resisting the cruelty and lawlessness of the current administration. You protested immigrant kidnappings and D.O.G.E. raids of our personal information, volunteered with those on the right side of history and humanity, and ran for office. You stood up for Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion and I am very proud to have stood with you. We will have more protests, but please volunteer with your local Democratic Committees and my campaign – [Volunteer with Beth Farnham for Congress, here!](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/welcome-volunteers/) to make a difference beyond calling attention to the issues.
---
Here’s a snapshot of what we did –
---
<https://www.instagram.com/reel/DS72oTUETrc/?igsh=OWIzMzR6YzgwMWYw>
As a spectacular start to the New Year, resisters have successfully lobbied for the removal of the National Guard from the cities of Los Angeles, Chicago, and Portland.
---
In parallel to the grievances filed by our Revolutionary Founders in our precious Declaration of Independence, Trump “...has kept among us, in times of peace, Standing Armies, without the consent of our legislatures.”
---
But mercifully, the judges in these cases kept their oaths to the Constitution.
---
“Judges overseeing lawsuits filed by cities challenging the deployments have consistently ruled that the Trump administration overstepped its authority and found that there is no evidence to support claims that troops are necessary to protect federal property from protesters.”
---
And so, Trump will not be able to keep standing armies in the cities full of diverse, equal, and included Americans he hates so much.
---
Of course there are several other grievances that also apply to Trump and you can take [a poll on my website](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2026/01/02/poll-2/) to decide which ones resonate the most.
---
Naturally, our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, says nothing because he would prefer that Trump keep violating the US Constitution. It’s why he never mentions the 552 lawsuits filed against the Trump administration.
---
But I care about the Constitution, the oaths to it that many government workers and community members dutifully swear, and the people who are bound by it. I will uphold my oath to the US Constitution when you elect me. And we can keep resisting Trump’s constitutional violations together.
---
|
---
Unfortunately, this year quickly took a dive as the Trump administration decided to invade Venezuela.
---
In an horrific act of violence, and (unlike the US capture of Manuel Noriega) without:
---
– the bipartisan approval of Congress,
---
– the declaration of war by that sovereign nation,
---
– nor fatal attacks on our own US military,
---
our rogue US President ordered the US military to invade Venezuela and kidnap that nation’s president and his wife.
---
While Nicolas Maduro is not without crimes against his people, Trump violating Constitutional law and international order is yet another rung on the ladder of an American one party dictatorial state. Even though the Trump administration claims drug-trafficking as the primary justification of its newest illegality, Trump in 2025 literally pardoned Honduras’s president who had been convicted of drug-trafficking by the US government and sent to prison.
---
Just like Putin does from Russia, Trump is attempting to create an authoritarian regime based on his whims alone, instead of maintaining our Constitutional Republic which is a form of DEMOCRACY. By forfeiting Constitutional law and Congressional approval, Trump is effectively eliminating the Voice of the People.
---
Please call our do-nothing US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, at (202) 225-2431 to demand his vote to impeach President Trump for his extreme disregard of US Law and Order.
---
And please donate to my campaign so I can continue to fight for us, The People, and defeat Joyce in the November 2026 election.
---
<https://www.youtube.com/shorts/zW9NCYdUyHE>
Meanwhile, our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, believes that the US government doesn’t have the authority to grant exemptions to states in order to impose higher standards of clean air and water, but does have the authority to grant polluters exemptions to EPA standards.
---
Listen to his pathetic attempts to justify his hypocrisy in order to pollute our air and water with mercury, arsenic, and other toxic chemicals, then vote for me, Beth Farnham, to defeat him in November!
---
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
---
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
---
Sincerely,
---
Beth
---
| [Like](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2026/01/04/district-round-up-01-04-26/?like_actor=248418217&like_hmac=a254e93d203ba7fa2c14d5eff1c4f893&postid=6052&like=1&source=sub_email)

name: Field Team, Mark Warner for Virginia
subject: Happening now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122649510/593126852/-1720966344?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_PetitionCollection_260104_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDBjNWExOC1jM2U5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ygn0iZZGcBlwVZQKwDa69VRyAngFmvU0eeZLr4LU45A=) Huge news, Derek:

**Team Warner is on the ground TODAY collecting the signatures needed to get Mark Warner on the ballot this year.**

Before any votes are cast in the midterm elections, we are legally required to get 10,000 signatures from Virginia voters to earn our spot on the ballot.

_With so much on the line in this election, our team isn’t wasting a single day!_

We’re committed to building an aggressive, innovative and strategic ground game to reach the voters we need to win and elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

But the reality is, early resources are KEY to keeping up our momentum for the next 11 months, and we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to fund our campaign.

[_**Will you rush in $26 to help build our groundgame to get Mark on the ballot, mobilize our base, and earn every vote? A donation made today will have a much bigger impact than a donation made right before election day.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122649511/593126853/-1720966344?amount=26&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_PetitionCollection_260104_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDBjNWExOC1jM2U5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ygn0iZZGcBlwVZQKwDa69VRyAngFmvU0eeZLr4LU45A=) ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122649512/593126854/-1720966344?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_PetitionCollection_260104_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDBjNWExOC1jM2U5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ygn0iZZGcBlwVZQKwDa69VRyAngFmvU0eeZLr4LU45A=)**** Thank you,

Team Warner **Before you go:**

Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters.

name: Team Jena
subject: re: out on the campaign trail!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Peter,
We wanted to make sure you saw Jena’s update from the campaign trail from yesterday! Our campaign is reaching all corners of the state, and we’ll continue to reach voters this month as we kick off our listening tour.
See the update below, and donate to our campaign today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-jg?refcode=260104-email]
Thanks,
Team Jena
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-jg?refcode=260104-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-jg?refcode=260104-email]
Peter,
What an incredible time on the campaign trail!
From standing with UNC workers in Greeley and SEIU 105 on the picket line — to cutting the ribbon at the new Stanley Chocolate Factory back home in Estes Park — to celebrating our amazing volunteers with the Boulder Democratic Party — to joining the HD4 Democrats to talk about what’s at stake for our communities, I’m so grateful for every conversation and every person I meet.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-jg?refcode=260104-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-jg?refcode=260104-email]
These moments are why I’m running. I will always stand with Colorado workers and their unions, fight for small businesses and vibrant mountain towns, and work alongside grassroots leaders and volunteers who power our democracy. That’s the kind of Attorney General I’ll be — focused on protecting people’s rights, defending our Colorado way of life, and ensuring every family has a fair shot. Chip in now to join our campaign! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-jg?refcode=260104-email]
And this is only the beginning.
Starting in January, I’ll be launching a statewide Fighting for Colorado Listening Tour – to hear directly from the people I hope to serve. I want to hear from Coloradans about what’s keeping you up at night and where you think this state should go as we move forward.
But to make this Listening Tour possible — the miles, the events, the organizing, the outreach — I’m counting on our grassroots team.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-jg?refcode=260104-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-jg?refcode=260104-email]
Can you chip in today to help us take this campaign to every community? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-jg?refcode=260104-email]
👉 $15 helps us reach new voters [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-jg?refcode=260104-email&amount=15]
👉 $25 helps us organize listening sessions across the state [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-jg?refcode=260104-email&amount=25]
👉 $50 or more helps fuel the full tour and keep us moving [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-jg?refcode=260104-email&amount=50]
Every conversation matters. Every story matters. And every donation helps us meet more Coloradans where they are.
Thank you for being part of this campaign and this movement. I can’t wait to see you out on the road in 2026.
– Jena
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: a decisive blow against MAGA here in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
we have to go big — and we have to do it quickly.
#

Peter,
Jon and our entire team are going to spend 2026 fighting like hell not only to win but to strike a decisive blow against the MAGA agenda here in Georgia.
But in order to run a campaign that can win in November, we have to go BIG — and we have to do it quickly. That means hiring staff, opening field offices across the state, getting ready to run our own ads, and more... all while responding to MAGA’s attacks.
It’s a lot, and Jon can’t do it alone. We’re sorry to have to ask again so soon into the new year, but we’re running a people-powered campaign and we need your help to ensure Jon has the resources to compete and win.
[**If you can afford it, please, chip in $5 or $10 to Jon’s reelection today. It means so much to Jon and to all of us to know you’re with us.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.wPRyEn&refcode=em260104-1-f&t=1&akid=1381%2E5691347%2EKOEfX9)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.ZJJ1in&amount=5&refcode=em260104-1-f&t=2&akid=1381%2E5691347%2EKOEfX9)**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.ZJJ1in&amount=10&refcode=em260104-1-f&t=3&akid=1381%2E5691347%2EKOEfX9)**
**[DONATE OTHER](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.ZJJ1in&refcode=em260104-1-f%7D&t=4&akid=1381%2E5691347%2EKOEfX9)**
With gratitude,
Team Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate

name: Deb Haaland
subject: A self-funded GOP multimillionaire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
The support of this grassroots team has never been more important.

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?refcode=jtk117-fr-nd&t=1&akid=6571%2E400544%2EZiCEGb)
---
Friend, I’ve got some important news that I had to share right away: **A self-funded GOP multimillionaire has entered this race in New Mexico.**
_And get this, he’s already pledged to give his campaign $2 MILLION of his own money._

I urgently need your grassroots support to ensure my campaign can compete. _**[So please, will you chip in $5 right now to help me close the gap on my $50,000 goal and win in New Mexico?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3345?refcode=jtk117-fr-nd&amount=5&t=2&akid=6571%2E400544%2EZiCEGb)**_
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3345?refcode=jtk117-fr-nd&t=3&akid=6571%2E400544%2EZiCEGb)
---
**I’ll be honest: This is going to be a tough race.** It's already clear that the GOP is going to try to buy this race, and unlike my multimillionaire opponent, I can't just write myself a check.

I don’t come from wealth, friend. I have never had the means to self-fund a campaign. I was a single mom living paycheck to paycheck, relying on government programs like SNAP, WIC, and Medicaid to help keep my child fed and healthy. **So I know what it's like to struggle — and I also know that it takes a village, in both life and in politics. I strongly believe leaders should make people’s lives easier, not harder. We all want good roads, safe communities, strong education, access to parks, and affordable, healthy food to eat.**
That's why I’m running to be the next governor of New Mexico, to build a better future for working families. But I need your help to reach my midnight fundraising goal to make that a reality:

**I'm running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support from folks like you chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare to help me go up against these self-funded multimillionaires.**_**[Please, will you chip in to help me win and keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3345?refcode=jtk117-fr-nd&t=4&akid=6571%2E400544%2EZiCEGb)**_

Deb

| Dear Patriot,
---
There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you.
---
No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial _this _Monday__ , I know with absolute confidence that history will say: **_“Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.”_**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21330701/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ydWR5LWRlZmVuc2UtdHJ1c3QvYzgzMWUzMTc2NzNkMDFkNi8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMDQ/LbmNsQjcwSTdubw/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MTIzMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9UldfQiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1PTE1QJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIyMjAxX3dyMg/gaVr-tg/s9pfeabb6f3)
__
---
**I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump.**
---
_Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my** _own_**._
---
**That’s why I officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE – with my trial beginning on _January 5_.**
---
_Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit._
---
But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get.
---
_I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America._
---
With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and _WON_!
---
_But, if you can’t give right now (I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, and you likely have a lot on your plate and your mind), then please just carry on with your day._
---
[**But if you can, please make a contribution before MONDAY to my brand new “Rudy Defense Trust” to help me fight for my freedom and justice and beat the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for life.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21330701/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ydWR5LWRlZmVuc2UtdHJ1c3QvYzgzMWUzMTc2NzNkMDFkNi8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMDQ/LbmNsQjcwSTdubw/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MTIzMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9UldfQiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1PTE1QJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIyMjAxX3dyMg/gaVr-tg/s9pfeabb6f3)
